papers.title: Dynamic-II Pipeline: Compiling Loops With Irregular Branches on Static-Scheduling CGRA.
papers.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable architecture (CGRA) is a promising programmable hardware with high power-efficiency and high performance. However, compiling and optimizing loops with irregular branches on CGRAs is a challenge to fulfill the performance potential. Existing predication techniques, such as partial predication (PP) and full predication (FP), conservatively implement software pipeline with a static initiation interval (II) obtained from the maximum graph, and thus only parts of the graph in each loop iteration will be actually executed, resulting in underexploited performance. To exploit more loop-level parallelism for irregular branches, this article proposes a novel dynamic-II pipeline (DIP) scheme, which realizes a pipeline with variable II by accommodating multiple iterations of short path in one static configuration. Since the DIP scheme is effective to only certain types of branches, this article designs a hybrid compilation framework integrating other complementary methods, which selects the appropriate method for source programs according to a proposed performance evaluation model. Experimental results show that: 1) the hybrid compilation framework can effectively extract branch features, correctly choose and implement corresponding branch processing methods within acceptable compile time and 2) as compared to PP and FP, DIP brings a significant total execution time (TET) reduction by 27.21% and 22.04% on average when the execution probability of a short branch is 50%.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构（CGRA）是一种具有高能效和高性能的有前途的可编程硬件。然而，在 CGRA 上编译和优化具有不规则分支的循环对于发挥性能潜力来说是一个挑战。现有的预测技术，例如部分预测（PP）和完全预测（FP），保守地使用从最大图获得的静态启动间隔（II）来实现软件管道，因此每次循环迭代中只有部分图会被实际执行，导致性能未得到充分利用。为了利用不规则分支的更多循环级并行性，本文提出了一种新颖的动态 II 管道（DIP）方案，该方案通过在一个静态配置中容纳短路径的多次迭代来实现具有变量 II 的管道。由于DIP方案仅对某些类型的分支有效，因此本文设计了一种集成其他补充方法的混合编译框架，该框架根据提出的性能评估模型为源程序选择合适的方法。实验结果表明：1）混合编译框架能够有效提取分支特征，在可接受的编译时间内正确选择并实现相应的分支处理方法；2）与PP和FP相比，当短分支执行概率为50%时，DIP带来的总执行时间（TET）平均显着降低27.21%和22.04%。

papers.title: Eff-ECC: Protecting GPGPUs Register File With a Unified Energy-Efficient ECC Mechanism.
papers.abstract: Graphics processing units (GPUs) are widely used in general-purpose high-performance computing applications (i.e., GPGPUs), which require reliable execution in the presence of soft errors. To support massive thread-level parallelism, a sizeable register file is adopted in GPUs, which is highly vulnerable to soft errors. Although modern commercial GPUs provide single-error-correction double-error-detection (SEC-DED) error correction code (ECC) for the register file, it consumes a considerable amount of energy due to frequent register accesses and leakage power of ECC storage. In this article, we propose to leverage the error sensitivity of instructions, the duplicate characteristics of the same-named registers, and the error sensitivity of data bits to build a unified energy-efficient ECC mechanism for a GPGPUs register file (Eff-ECC), which consists of instruction-aware ECC (IA-ECC), duplication-aware ECC (DA-ECC), and bit-aware ECC (BA-ECC). Considering the error sensitivity of instructions, IA-ECC merely implements ECCs for the write registers of critical instructions. Observing the same-named registers across threads usually keeps the same data, DA-ECC avoids unnecessary ECC generation and verification for duplicate register values. Leveraging the inherent error-tolerance features of the program, BA-ECC merely protects significant bits of registers to combat the crucial error. Experimental results demonstrate that Eff-ECC tremendously reduces 86.46% energy consumption of traditional SEC-DED ECC.
papers.abstract_zh: 图形处理单元 (GPU) 广泛用于通用高性能计算应用（即 GPGPU），这些应用需要在存在软错误的情况下可靠地执行。为了支持大规模线程级并行，GPU 中采用了相当大的寄存器文件，这很容易出现软错误。尽管现代商用GPU为寄存器文件提供单纠错双纠错（SEC-DED）纠错码（ECC），但由于频繁的寄存器访问和ECC存储的泄漏功率，它消耗了大量的能量。在本文中，我们建议利用指令的错误敏感性、同名寄存器的重复特性和数据位的错误敏感性，为GPGPU寄存器文件构建统一的节能ECC机制（Eff-ECC），该机制由指令感知ECC（IA-ECC）、重复感知ECC（DA-ECC）和位感知ECC（BA-ECC）组成。考虑到指令的错误敏感性，IA-ECC仅对关键指令的写寄存器实现ECC。跨线程观察同名寄存器通常会保留相同的数据，DA-ECC 避免了不必要的 ECC 生成和对重复寄存器值的验证。利用程序固有的容错功能，BA-ECC 仅保护寄存器的重要位以对抗关键错误。实验结果表明，Eff-ECC 比传统 SEC-DED ECC 大幅降低了 86.46% 的能耗。

papers.title: Efficient Complete Verification of Neural Networks via Layerwised Splitting and Refinement.
papers.abstract: Safety and robustness properties are highly required for neural networks deployed in safety-critical applications. Current complete verification techniques of these properties suffer from the lack of efficiency and effectiveness. In this article, we present an efficient complete approach to verify safety and robustness properties of neural networks through incrementally determinizing activation states of neurons. The key idea is to generate constraints via layerwised splitting that make activation states of hidden neurons become deterministic efficiently. These constraints are then utilized for refining inputs systematically so that abstract analysis over the refined input can be more precise. Our approach decomposes a verification problem into a set of subproblems via layerwised input space splitting. The property is then checked on each subproblem, where the activation states of at least one hidden neurons will be determinized. Further checking is accelerated by constraint-guided input refinement. We have implemented a parallel tool called LayerSAR to verify safety and robustness properties of ReLU neural networks in a sound and complete way, and evaluated it extensively on several benchmark sets. Experimental results show that our approach is promising, compared with complete tools, such as Planet, Neurify, Marabou, ERAN, Venus, Venus2, and nnenum in verifying safety and robustness properties on the benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 在安全关键型应用中部署的神经网络非常需要安全性和鲁棒性。目前对这些属性的完整验证技术缺乏效率和有效性。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的完整方法，通过逐步确定神经元的激活状态来验证神经网络的安全性和鲁棒性特性。关键思想是通过分层分裂生成约束，使隐藏神经元的激活状态有效地变得确定性。然后利用这些约束来系统地细化输入，以便对细化输入的抽象分析可以更加精确。我们的方法通过分层输入空间分割将验证问题分解为一组子问题。然后检查每个子问题的属性，其中至少一个隐藏神经元的激活状态将被确定。通过约束引导的输入细化加速了进一步的检查。我们实现了一个名为 LayerSAR 的并行工具，以健全、完整的方式验证 ReLU 神经网络的安全性和鲁棒性，并在多个基准集上对其进行了广泛的评估。实验结果表明，与 Planet、Neurify、Marabou、ERAN、Venus、Venus2 和 nnenum 等完整工具相比，我们的方法在验证基准上的安全性和稳健性方面很有前景。

papers.title: Efficient Hardware Acceleration of Sparsely Active Convolutional Spiking Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) compute in an event-based manner to achieve a more efficient computation than standard neural networks. In SNNs, neuronal outputs are not encoded as real-valued activations but as sequences of binary spikes. The motivation of using SNNs over conventional neural networks is rooted in the special computational aspects of spike-based processing, especially the high degree of sparsity of spikes. Well-established implementations of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) feature large spatial arrays of processing elements (PEs) that remain highly underutilized in the face of activation sparsity. We propose a novel architecture optimized for the processing of convolutional SNNs (CSNNs) featuring a high degree of sparsity. The proposed architecture consists of an array of PEs of the size of the kernel of a convolution and an intelligent spike queue that provides a high PE utilization. A constant flow of spikes is ensured by compressing the feature maps into queues that can then be processed spike-by-spike. This compression is performed at run-time, leading to a self-timed schedule. This allows the processing time to scale with the number of spikes. Also, a novel memory organization scheme is introduced to efficiently store and retrieve the membrane potentials of the individual neurons using multiple small parallel on-chip RAMs. Each RAM is hardwired to its PE, reducing switching circuitry. We implemented the proposed architecture on an FPGA and achieved a significant speedup compared to previously proposed SNN implementations (~10 times) while needing less hardware resources and maintaining a higher energy efficiency (~15 times).
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 以基于事件的方式进行计算，以实现比标准神经网络更高效的计算。在 SNN 中，神经元输出不编码为实值激活，而是编码为二进制尖峰序列。相对于传统神经网络，使用 SNN 的动机源于基于脉冲的处理的特殊计算方面，尤其是脉冲的高度稀疏性。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的成熟实现具有处理元件 (PE) 的大型空间阵列，但在激活稀疏性的情况下，这些阵列仍然没有得到充分利用。我们提出了一种针对具有高度稀疏性的卷积 SNN (CSNN) 处理进行优化的新颖架构。所提出的架构由卷积核大小的 PE 数组和提供高 PE 利用率的智能尖峰队列组成。通过将特征图压缩到队列中，然后可以逐个尖峰进行处理，可以确保尖峰的恒定流。这种压缩是在运行时执行的，从而形成一个自定时的计划。这允许处理时间随着尖峰的数量而变化。此外，还引入了一种新颖的存储器组织方案，以使用多个小型并行片上 RAM 有效地存储和检索单个神经元的膜电位。每个 RAM 都硬连线到其 PE，从而减少了开关电路。我们在 FPGA 上实现了所提出的架构，与之前提出的 SNN 实现相比，实现了显着的加速（约 10 倍），同时需要更少的硬件资源并保持更高的能源效率（约 15 倍）。

papers.title: Enabling Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization From On-Device Learning of the Video Stream.
papers.abstract: Detecting actions in videos have been widely applied in on-device applications, such as cars, robots, etc. Practical on-device videos are always untrimmed with both action and background. It is desirable for a model to both recognize the class of action and localize the temporal position where the action happens. Such a task is called temporal action location (TAL), which is always trained on the cloud where multiple untrimmed videos are collected and labeled. It is desirable for a TAL model to continuously and locally learn from new data, which can directly improve the action detection precision while protecting customers’ privacy. However, directly training a TAL model on the device is nontrivial. To train a TAL model which can precisely recognize and localize each action, tremendous video samples with temporal annotations are required. However, annotating videos frame by frame is exorbitantly time consuming and expensive. Although weakly supervised temporal action localization (W-TAL) has been proposed to learn from untrimmed videos with only video-level labels, such an approach is also not suitable for on-device learning scenarios. In practical on-device learning applications, data are collected in streaming. For example, the camera on the device keeps collecting video frames for hours or days, and the actions of nearly all classes are included in a single long video stream. Dividing such a long video stream into multiple video segments requires lots of human effort, which hinders the exploration of applying the TAL tasks to realistic on-device learning applications. To enable W-TAL models to learn from a long, untrimmed streaming video, we propose an efficient video learning approach that can directly adapt to new environments. We first propose a self-adaptive video dividing approach with a contrast score-based segment merging approach to convert the video stream into multiple segments. Then, we explore different sampling strategies on the TAL tasks to request as few labels as possible. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first attempt to directly learn from the on-device, long video stream. Experimental results on the THUMOS’14 dataset show that the performance of our approach is comparable to the current W-TAL state-of-the-art (SOTA) work without any laborious manual video splitting.
papers.abstract_zh: 检测视频中的动作已广泛应用于设备上的应用，例如汽车、机器人等。实际的设备上视频总是没有经过动作和背景的修剪。我们希望模型能够识别动作类别并定位动作发生的时间位置。这样的任务称为时间动作定位（TAL），它始终在云端进行训练，在云端收集和标记多个未修剪的视频。 TAL 模型需要不断地在本地学习新数据，这可以直接提高动作检测精度，同时保护客户的隐私。然而，直接在设备上训练 TAL 模型并非易事。为了训练一个能够精确识别和定位每个动作的 TAL 模型，需要大量带有时间注释的视频样本。然而，逐帧注释视频非常耗时且昂贵。尽管弱监督时间动作定位（W-TAL）已被提出来从仅具有视频级标签的未修剪视频中进行学习，但这种方法也不适合设备上的学习场景。在实际的设备上学习应用程序中，数据以流式传输的方式收集。例如，设备上的摄像头持续收集视频帧数小时或数天，并且几乎所有类别的动作都包含在单个长视频流中。将这么长的视频流分成多个视频片段需要大量的人力，这阻碍了将 TAL 任务应用于现实的设备上学习应用程序的探索。为了使 W-TAL 模型能够从未经修剪的长流视频中学习，我们提出了一种可以直接适应新环境的高效视频学习方法。我们首先提出了一种自适应视频分割方法，采用基于对比度分数的片段合并方法，将视频流转换为多个片段。然后，我们在 TAL 任务上探索不同的采样策略，以请求尽可能少的标签。据我们所知，我们是第一次尝试直接从设备上的长视频流中学习。 THUMOS’14 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法的性能可与当前 W-TAL 最先进的 (SOTA) 工作相媲美，无需任何费力的手动视频分割。

papers.title: Energy-Efficient DNN Inference on Approximate Accelerators Through Formal Property Exploration.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are being heavily utilized in modern applications, putting energy-constraint devices to the test. To bypass high energy consumption issues, approximate computing has been employed in DNN accelerators to balance out the accuracy-energy reduction trade-off. However, the approximation-induced accuracy loss can be very high and drastically degrade the performance of the DNN. Therefore, there is a need for a fine-grain mechanism that would assign specific DNN operations to approximation to maintain acceptable DNN accuracy, while achieving low energy consumption. We present an automated framework for weight-to-approximation mapping through formal property exploration for approximate DNN accelerators. At the MAC unit level, our experimental evaluation surpassed already energy-efficient mappings by more than <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\times 2$ </tex-math></inline-formula> in terms of energy gains, while supporting a fine-grain control over the introduced approximation.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在现代应用中得到大量使用，对能量约束设备进行测试。为了绕过高能耗问题，DNN 加速器中采用了近似计算来平衡精度与能耗之间的权衡。然而，近似引起的精度损失可能非常高，并且会极大地降低 DNN 的性能。因此，需要一种细粒度机制，将特定的 DNN 操作分配给近似值，以保持可接受的 DNN 精度，同时实现低能耗。我们提出了一个通过近似 DNN 加速器的形式属性探索来实现权重到近似映射的自动化框架。在 MAC 单元级别，我们的实验评估在能量增益方面超过了已经节能的映射 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\times 2$ </tex-math></inline-formula>，同时支持对引入的近似值进行细粒度控制。

papers.title: Equivalence Checking of Sequential Quantum Circuits.
papers.abstract: We define a formal framework for equivalence checking of sequential quantum circuits. The model we adopt is a quantum state machine, which is a natural quantum generalisation of Mealy machines. A major difficulty in checking quantum circuits (but not present in checking classical circuits) is that the state spaces of quantum circuits are continuums. This difficulty is resolved by our main theorem showing that equivalence checking of two quantum Mealy machines can be done with input sequences that are taken from some chosen basis (which are finite) and have a length quadratic in the dimensions of the state Hilbert spaces of the machines. Based on this theoretical result, we develop an (and to the best of our knowledge, the first) algorithm for checking equivalence of sequential quantum circuits with running time $\mathcal{O}(2^{3m+5l}(2^{3m}+2^{3l}))$, where $m$ and $l$ denote the numbers of input and internal qubits, respectively. The complexity of our algorithm is comparable with that of the known algorithms for checking classical sequential circuits in the sense that both are exponential in the number of (qu)bits. Several case studies and experiments are presented.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们定义了一个用于顺序量子电路等价性检查的正式框架。我们采用的模型是量子状态机，它是 Mealy 机的自然量子推广。检查量子电路的一个主要困难（但在检查经典电路中不存在）是量子电路的状态空间是连续体。我们的主要定理解决了这个困难，该定理表明两个量子 Mealy 机的等价性检查可以通过从某个选定的基础（有限的）中获取的输入序列来完成，并且在机器的状态希尔伯特空间的维度上具有长度二次方。基于这一理论结果，我们开发了一种（据我们所知，第一个）算法来检查顺序量子电路与运行时间 $\mathcal{O}(2^{3m+5l}(2^{3m}+2^{3l}))$ 的等价性，其中 $m$ 和 $l$ 分别表示输入和内部量子位的数量。我们的算法的复杂性与用于检查经典时序电路的已知算法的复杂性相当，因为两者在（qu）位的数量上都是指数级的。介绍了几个案例研究和实验。

papers.title: Evaluating the Security of Logic-Locked Probabilistic Circuits.
papers.abstract: Logic locking is a design-for-security scheme to thwart attacks by an untrusted foundry. Prior work exposed the vulnerability of logic-locked circuits using Boolean satisfiability (SAT). While these attacks are effective against deterministic circuits, they cannot unlock probabilistic/approximate designs, which have become increasingly popular. In this work, we expand SAT-style attacks to locked circuits with a probabilistic behavior. We propose StatSAT , an attack incorporating statistical techniques into the SAT attack to unlock probabilistic designs. We then propose a countermeasure, called high error rate keys (HERKs), to thwart StatSAT and other attacks on probabilistic circuits. HERKs leverage high error wires, caused by the probabilistic behavior, to hide the correct key under stochastic noise.
papers.abstract_zh: 逻辑锁定是一种安全设计方案，旨在阻止不受信任的代工厂的攻击。先前的工作揭示了使用布尔可满足性（SAT）的逻辑锁定电路的漏洞。虽然这些攻击对确定性电路有效，但它们无法解锁已经变得越来越流行的概率/近似设计。在这项工作中，我们将 SAT 式攻击扩展到具有概率行为的锁定电路。我们提出 StatSAT ，这是一种将统计技术融入到 SAT 攻击中以解锁概率设计的攻击。然后，我们提出了一种称为高错误率密钥 (HERK) 的对策，以阻止 StatSAT 和对概率电路的其他攻击。 HERK 利用由概率行为引起的高错误线来隐藏随机噪声下的正确密钥。

papers.title: Experimental Validation of a Novel Methodology for Electromigration Assessment in On-Chip Power Grids.
papers.abstract: A recently proposed theoretical methodology for the assessment of the electromigration (EM) induced IR-drop degradation in on-chip power/ground grids has been validated by means of measurements performed on real silicon. A voltage tapping technique was employed for the direct measurement of voltage variations at 162 nodes of the power net, stressed with 10 mA constant source current at an elevated temperature of 350 °C. A voltage drop between cathode and anode pads exceeding a specified threshold was considered as a failure. Times-to-failure (TTF) was measured on 19 packaged test grids and used for computing the mean TTF (MTTF). The EM-induced voltage degradation in this grid was also analyzed with an assessment methodology based on a simulation of stress evolution everywhere in the grid, resulting in a voiding in some of grid branches and corresponding resistance increase. A set of voiding compact models for different grid segments was developed and used in the simulations. The stochastic nature of the EM phenomenon was captured by introducing random distributions of atomic diffusivities and critical stresses across the grid and iterating them with Monte Carlo loops. A good fit between the measured voltage evolution kinetics at different grid nodes and that predicted by simulation, and the good agreement between measured and simulated failure distributions can be considered as the ever first experimental validation of this EM assessment methodology for on-chip power/ground (p/g) grids.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近提出的用于评估片上电源/接地网格中电迁移 (EM) 引起的 IR 压降退化的理论方法已通过在真实硅上进行的测量得到验证。采用电压分接技术直接测量电网 162 个节点的电压变化，并在 350 °C 的高温下施加 10 mA 恒定源电流。阴极和阳极垫之间的电压降超过指定阈值被视为故障。在 19 个封装测试网格上测量无故障时间 (TTF)，并用于计算平均 TTF (MTTF)。还使用基于网格各处应力演化模拟的评估方法来分析该网格中电磁引起的电压降级，导致一些网格分支出现空洞并相应增加电阻。开发了一组针对不同网格段的空隙紧凑模型并在模拟中使用。通过在网格上引入原子扩散率和临界应力的随机分布并使用蒙特卡罗循环对其进行迭代，捕获了电磁现象的随机性质。不同电网节点的测量电压演化动力学与仿真预测之间的良好拟合，以及测量和仿真故障分布之间的良好一致性，可以被视为对片上电源/接地 (p/g) 网格的电磁评估方法的首次实验验证。

papers.title: Experimental Verification and Analysis of the Acceleration Factor Model for 3-D nand Flash Memory.
papers.abstract: With the increasing density of flash memory, its service life is declining. As the most important technical index of a flash device, flash retention parameters often need to consume a substantial amount of time to be tested. With a view toward reducing the test period, the most popular method currently is to speedup the retention loss of flash memory at high temperatures. However, since the retention loss of flash memory is the result of a mixture of multiple failure mechanisms, the Arrhenius model with a single apparent activation energy ( <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> ) has significant limitations in calculating the high-temperature acceleration factor for the retention loss of flash memory. In this article, based on a large number of real experiments, we have studied the retention characteristics of the flash memory in high-temperature environments and closely tracked the change of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> at different temperatures, retention time, and program/erase (P/E) cycle count. The experimental results show that the equivalent acceleration factor (AF) grows rapidly with retention time at the beginning of flash retention and that flash with a high P/E cycle count has a faster AF growth rate.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着闪存密度的不断增加，其使用寿命也在下降。作为闪存器件最重要的技术指标，闪存保留参数往往需要耗费大量的时间进行测试。为了缩短测试周期，目前最流行的方法是加快闪存在高温下的保持损失。然而，由于闪存的保留损失是多种故障机制混合的结果，因此具有单一表观激活能的阿伦尼乌斯模型 ( <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> ）在计算闪存保留损耗的高温加速因子时具有很大的局限性。本文基于大量真实实验，研究了闪存在高温环境下的保持特性，并密切跟踪<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$的变化</tex-math></inline-formula> 在不同温度、保留时间和编程/擦除 (P/E) 周期计数下。实验结果表明，在闪存保留开始时，等效加速因子（AF）随着保留时间快速增长，并且P/E循环次数高的闪存具有更快的AF增长率。

papers.title: Exploring Bitslicing Architectures for Enabling FHE-Assisted Machine Learning.
papers.abstract: Homomorphic encryption (HE) is the ultimate tool for performing secure computations even in untrusted environments. Application of HE for deep learning (DL) inference is an active area of research, given the fact that DL models are often deployed in untrusted environments (e.g., third-party servers) yet inferring on private data. However, existing HE libraries [somewhat (SWHE), leveled (LHE) or fully homomorphic (FHE)] suffer from extensive computational and memory overhead. Few performance optimized high-speed homomorphic libraries are either suffering from certain approximation issues leading to decryption errors or proven to be insecure according to recent published attacks. In this article, we propose architectural tricks to achieve performance speedup for encrypted DL inference developed with exact HE schemes without any approximation or decryption error in homomorphic computations. The main idea is to apply quantization and suitable data packing in the form of bitslicing to reduce the costly noise handling operation, Bootstrapping while achieving a functionally correct and highly parallel DL pipeline with a moderate memory footprint. Experimental evaluation on the MNIST dataset shows a significant ( <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$37\times$ </tex-math></inline-formula> ) speedup over the nonbitsliced versions of the same architecture. Low memory bandwidths (700 MB) of our design pipelines further highlight their promise toward scaling over larger gamut of Edge-AI analytics use cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 同态加密 (HE) 是即使在不可信环境中也能执行安全计算的终极工具。鉴于 DL 模型通常部署在不受信任的环境（例如第三方服务器）中但仍对私有数据进行推断，因此将 HE 在深度学习 (DL) 推断中的应用是一个活跃的研究领域。然而，现有的 HE 库 [某种程度上 (SWHE)、分级 (LHE) 或完全同态 (FHE)] 面临着大量的计算和内存开销。很少有性能优化的高速同态库要么遭受某些导致解密错误的近似问题，要么根据最近发布的攻击被证明是不安全的。在本文中，我们提出了一些架构技巧，以实现使用精确 HE 方案开发的加密深度学习推理的性能加速，而在同态计算中不会出现任何近似或解密错误。主要思想是以位切片的形式应用量化和适当的数据打包，以减少昂贵的噪声处理操作和引导，同时实现功能正确且高度并行的深度学习管道，并具有适度的内存占用。对 MNIST 数据集的实验评估显示，与非位切片版本相比，速度显着提高 ( <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$37\times$ </tex-math></inline-formula> )相同的架构。我们设计管道的低内存带宽 (700 MB) 进一步凸显了它们对扩展更大范围的边缘 AI 分析用例的承诺。

papers.title: Exploring HW/SW Co-Design for Video Analysis on CPU-FPGA Heterogeneous Systems.
papers.abstract: Deep neural network (DNN)-based video analysis has become one of the most essential and challenging tasks to capture implicit information from video streams. Although DNNs significantly improve the analysis quality, they introduce intensive compute and memory demands and require dedicated hardware for efficient processing. The customized heterogeneous system is one of the promising solutions with general-purpose processors (CPUs) and specialized processors (DNN Accelerators). Among various heterogeneous systems, the combination of CPU and FPGA has been intensively studied for DNN inference with improved latency and energy consumption compared to CPU + GPU schemes and with increased flexibility and reduced time-to-market cost compared to CPU + ASIC designs. However, deploying DNN-based video analysis on CPU + FPGA systems still presents challenges from the tedious RTL programming, the intricate design verification, and the time-consuming design space exploration. To address these challenges, we present a novel framework, called EcoSys, to explore co-design and optimization opportunities on CPU-FPGA heterogeneous systems for accelerating video analysis. Novel technologies include 1) a coherent memory space shared by the host and the customized accelerator to enable efficient task partitioning and online DNN model refinement with reduced data transfer latency; 2) an end-to-end design flow that supports high-level design abstraction and allows rapid development of customized hardware accelerators from Python-based DNN descriptions; 3) a design space exploration (DSE) engine that determines the design space and explores the optimized solutions by considering the targeted heterogeneous system and user-specific constraints; and 4) a complete set of co-optimization solutions, including a layer-based pipeline, a feature map partition scheme, and an efficient memory hierarchical design for the accelerator and multithreading programming for the CPU. In this article, we demonstrate our design framework to accelerate the long-term recurrent convolution network (LRCN), which analyzes the input video and output one semantic caption for each frame. EcoSys can deliver 314.7 and 58.1 frames/s by targeting the LRCN model with AlexNet and VGG-16 backbone, respectively. Compared to the multithreaded CPU and pure FPGA design, EcoSys achieves <inline-formula> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$20.6\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> and <inline-formula> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.3\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> higher throughput performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络（DNN）的视频分析已成为从视频流中捕获隐含信息的最重要和最具挑战性的任务之一。尽管 DNN 显着提高了分析质量，但它们引入了密集的计算和内存需求，并且需要专用硬件来进行高效处理。定制的异构系统是具有通用处理器（CPU）和专用处理器（DNN 加速器）的有前景的解决方案之一。在各种异构系统中，CPU 和 FPGA 的组合已被广泛研究用于 DNN 推理，与 CPU + GPU 方案相比，它可以改善延迟和能耗，并且与 CPU + ASIC 设计相比，可以提高灵活性并降低上市时间成本。然而，在CPU+FPGA系统上部署基于DNN的视频分析仍然面临繁琐的RTL编程、复杂的设计验证和耗时的设计空间探索的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个名为 EcoSys 的新颖框架，用于探索 CPU-FPGA 异构系统上的协同设计和优化机会，以加速视频分析。新技术包括 1) 由主机和定制加速器共享的一致内存空间，以实现高效的任务分区和在线 DNN 模型细化，同时减少数据传输延迟； 2）端到端设计流程，支持高级设计抽象，并允许根据基于Python的DNN描述快速开发定制硬件加速器； 3）设计空间探索（DSE）引擎，通过考虑目标异构系统和用户特定的约束来确定设计空间并探索优化的解决方案； 4）一整套协同优化解决方案，包括基于层的管道、特征图分区方案、加速器的高效内存分层设计和CPU的多线程编程。在本文中，我们展示了加速长期循环卷积网络（LRCN）的设计框架，该网络分析输入视频并为每一帧输出一个语义标题。通过针对具有 AlexNet 和 VGG-16 主干的 LRCN 模型，EcoSys 可以分别提供 314.7 和 58.1 帧/秒。与多线程 CPU 和纯 FPGA 设计相比，EcoSys 实现了 <inline-formula> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$20.6\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 和 <inline-formula> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.3\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 更高的吞吐量性能。

papers.title: Exploring the Effect of Energy Storage Sizing on Intermittent Computing System Performance.
papers.abstract: Batteryless energy-harvesting devices promise to deliver a sustainable Internet of Things. Intermittent computing is an emerging area, where the application forward progress, i.e., computation beneficial to the progress of the active application, is maintained by saving the volatile computing state into nonvolatile memory before power interruptions, and restored afterward. Conventional intermittent computing approaches typically minimize energy storage to reduce device dimensions and interruption periods, but this can result in high state-saving and -restoring overheads and impede forward progress. In this article, we argue that adding a small amount of energy storage can significantly improve the forward progress. We develop an intermittent computing model that accurately estimates the forward progress, with an experimentally validated mean error of 0.5%. Using this model, we show that sizing energy storage can improve the forward progress by up to 65% with a constant current supply, and 43% with real-world photovoltaic sources. An extension to this approach, which uses a cost function to trade off the energy storage size against forward progress, can save 83% of capacitor volume and 91% of interruption periods while maintaining 93% of the maximum forward progress.
papers.abstract_zh: 无电池能量收集设备有望提供可持续的物联网。间歇计算是一个新兴领域，其中应用程序前进的进程，即有利于活动应用程序进程的计算，通过在断电前将易失性计算状态保存到非易失性存储器中来维持，并在断电后恢复。传统的间歇计算方法通常会最大限度地减少能量存储，以减少设备尺寸和中断周期，但这可能会导致较高的状态保存和恢复开销并阻碍前进。在本文中，我们认为添加少量能量存储可以显着提高前进进度。我们开发了一种间歇性计算模型，可以准确估计前进进度，经实验验证的平均误差为 0.5%。使用该模型，我们表明，调整储能大小可以将恒流电源的前进进度提高高达 65%，而使用实际光伏电源则可将前进进度提高 43%。这种方法的扩展，使用成本函数来权衡能量存储大小和前进进度，可以节省 83% 的电容器体积和 91% 的中断周期，同时保持 93% 的最大前进进度。

papers.title: Fast and Efficient High-Sigma Yield Analysis and Optimization Using Kernel Density Estimation on a Bayesian Optimized Failure Rate Model.
papers.abstract: With ever-increasing transistor density in nanoscale-integrated circuits, the impact of process variations on circuit performance and chip yield becomes dominant. To prevent failures in the field, simulation-based circuit optimization tools are performed during design time as a countermeasure. However, the efficiency of these tools requires accurate modeling of failure probabilities. Especially, for high-sigma problems such as yield estimation of memory cells, which require very high production yield, the failure rate assessment must be highly accurate. Importance sampling (IS) methods are deployed in this context to uncover very rare failure events, which cannot be revealed by standard Monte Carlo methods. Besides a highly accurate yield prediction model, the limited time budget of the simulation-based analysis tools has to be taken into account. Especially in conjunction with yield optimization techniques, the required number of circuit simulations for the failure rate estimation has to be substantially reduced. In this article, we propose a yield optimization method, which is based on a Bayesian optimization (BO) failure rate estimation technique for high-sigma yield extraction. The BO-based IS method is combined with a kernel density estimator for finding the most probable failure events, which have significant contribution to the chip yield. By integration into a global optimization framework, we show how the proposed yield optimization method can be applied to high-sigma yield optimization problems, such as memory cells. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method consumes only 5% circuit simulations to achieve the same optimization effect as the state-of-the-art yield optimizer techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着纳米级集成电路中晶体管密度的不断增加，工艺变化对电路性能和芯片良率的影响变得占主导地位。为了防止现场出现故障，在设计时执行基于仿真的电路优化工具作为对策。然而，这些工具的效率需要对故障概率进行准确的建模。特别是对于高西格玛问题，例如存储单元的良率估计，需要非常高的生产良率，因此故障率评估必须高度准确。在这种情况下，部署重要性采样 (IS) 方法来发现非常罕见的故障事件，而标准蒙特卡罗方法无法揭示这些事件。除了高精度的产量预测模型之外，还必须考虑基于模拟的分析工具的有限时间预算。特别是与良率优化技术相结合，必须大大减少故障率估计所需的电路模拟次数。在本文中，我们提出了一种良率优化方法，该方法基于用于高西格玛良率提取的贝叶斯优化（BO）故障率估计技术。基于 BO 的 IS 方法与内核密度估计器相结合，用于查找最可能的故障事件，这对芯片良率有重大贡献。通过集成到全局优化框架中，我们展示了所提出的良率优化方法如何应用于高西格玛良率优化问题，例如存储单元。实验结果表明，所提出的方法仅消耗 5% 的电路仿真，即可达到与最先进的良率优化器技术相同的优化效果。

papers.abstract: System design tools are often only available as input–output blackboxes: for a given design as input, they compute an output representing system behavior. Black

papers.title: Fast Design Space Exploration of Nonlinear Systems: Part II.
papers.abstract: Nonlinear system design is often a multi-objective optimization problem involving search for a design that satisfies a number of predefined constraints. The design space is typically very large since it includes all possible system architectures with different combinations of components composing each architecture. In this article, we address nonlinear system design space exploration through a two-step approach encapsulated in a framework called Fast Design Space Exploration of Nonlinear Systems (ASSENT). In the first step, we use a genetic algorithm to search for system architectures that allow discrete choices for component values or else only component values for a fixed architecture. This step yields a coarse design since the system may or may not meet the target specifications. In the second step, we use an inverse design to search over a continuous space and fine-tune the component values with the goal of improving the value of the objective function. We use a neural network to model the system response. The neural network is converted into a mixed-integer linear program for active learning to sample component values efficiently. We illustrate the efficacy of ASSENT on problems ranging from nonlinear system design to design of electrical circuits. Experimental results show that ASSENT achieves the same or better value of the objective function compared to various other optimization techniques for nonlinear system design by up to 54%. We improve sample efficiency by 6-10x compared to reinforcement learning based synthesis of electrical circuits.
papers.abstract_zh: 非线性系统设计通常是一个多目标优化问题，涉及搜索满足许多预定义约束的设计。设计空间通常非常大，因为它包括所有可能的系统架构以及构成每个架构的不同组件组合。在本文中，我们通过封装在称为非线性系统快速设计空间探索（ASSENT）的框架中的两步方法来解决非线性系统设计空间探索。第一步，我们使用遗传算法来搜索允许对组件值进行离散选择或仅对固定架构选择组件值的系统架构。此步骤产生粗略设计，因为系统可能满足也可能不满足目标规格。第二步，我们使用逆向设计来搜索连续空间并微调分量值，以提高目标函数的值。我们使用神经网络来模拟系统响应。神经网络被转换为混合整数线性程序，用于主动学习以有效地采样组件值。我们展示了 ASSENT 在解决从非线性系统设计到电路设计等问题上的功效。实验结果表明，与非线性系统设计的各种其他优化技术相比，ASSENT 可以实现相同或更好的目标函数值，提升高达 54%。与基于强化学习的电路合成相比，我们将样本效率提高了 6-10 倍。

papers.title: Fast Energy-Optimal Multikernel DNN-Like Application Allocation on Multi-FPGA Platforms.
papers.abstract: Platforms with multiple field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs), such as Amazon Web Services (AWS) F1 instances, can efficiently accelerate multikernel pipelined applications, e.g., convolutional neural networks for machine vision tasks or transformer networks for natural language processing tasks. To reduce energy consumption when the FPGAs are underutilized, we propose a model to 1) find offline the minimum-power solution for given throughput constraints and 2) dynamically reprogram the FPGA at runtime (which is complementary to dynamic voltage and frequency scaling) to match best the workloads when they change. The offline optimization model can be solved using a mixed-integer nonlinear programming (MINLP) solver, but it can be very slow. Hence, we provide two heuristic optimization methods that improve result quality within a bounded time. We use several very large designs to demonstrate that both heuristics obtain comparable results to MINLP, when it can find the best solution, and they obtain much better results than MINLP, when it cannot find the optimum within a bounded amount of time. The heuristic methods can also be thousands of times faster than the MINLP solver.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有多个现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的平台，例如 Amazon Web Services (AWS) F1 实例，可以有效加速多内核管道应用程序，例如用于机器视觉任务的卷积神经网络或用于自然语言处理任务的变压器网络。为了在 FPGA 未充分利用时降低能耗，我们提出了一个模型：1）针对给定的吞吐量限制找到离线最小功耗解决方案，2）在运行时动态地重新编程 FPGA（这是对动态电压和频率缩放的补充），以便在工作负载发生变化时最好地匹配工作负载。离线优化模型可以使用混合整数非线性规划 (MINLP) 求解器来求解，但速度可能非常慢。因此，我们提供了两种启发式优化方法，可以在有限的时间内提高结果质量。我们使用几个非常大的设计来证明，当能够找到最佳解决方案时，这两种启发式方法都可以获得与 MINLP 相当的结果，而当它无法在有限时间内找到最优解时，它们会获得比 MINLP 更好的结果。启发式方法也可以比 MINLP 求解器快数千倍。

papers.title: Flexible and Efficient QoS Provisioning in AXI4-Based Network-on-Chip Architecture.
papers.abstract: We propose a network-on-chip (NoC)-based whole system design, whose communication architecture is compatible with the advanced microcontroller bus architecture advanced extensible interface 4 (AXI4) protocol and supports high-performance multiple quality-of-service (QoS) schemes. In our system, the network interface (NI) between the NoC and the master/slave node is proposed to make the NoC architecture independent from the AXI4 protocol via message format conversion between the AXI4 signal format and the packet format, offering high flexibility to the NoC design. Besides, a QoS inheritance mechanism is applied in the slave-side NI to support QoS during packets’ round-trip transfer in the NoC. The NoC system contains time-division multiplexing (TDM) and virtual channel (VC) subnetworks to apply multiple QoS schemes to AXI4 signals with different QoS tags, and the NI is responsible for signals distribution between two subnetworks. Besides, a traffic converter is proposed in each NI to balance the traffic between the two subnetworks when necessary. The experimental results show that our proposed architecture ensures a high-throughput and low-latency NoC system. By applying the traffic converter, the packet latency can be improved.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于片上网络（NoC）的整体系统设计，其通信架构与先进的微控制器总线架构高级可扩展接口4（AXI4）协议兼容，并支持高性能的多种服务质量（QoS）方案。在我们的系统中，提出了NoC和主/从节点之间的网络接口（NI），通过AXI4信号格式和数据包格式之间的消息格式转换，使NoC架构独立于AXI4协议，为NoC设计提供了高度灵活性。此外，从侧NI中应用了QoS继承机制，以支持数据包在NoC中往返传输期间的QoS。 NoC 系统包含时分复用 (TDM) 和虚拟通道 (VC) 子网，可将多种 QoS 方案应用于具有不同 QoS 标签的 AXI4 信号，NI 负责两个子网之间的信号分配。此外，每个NI中都建议有一个流量转换器，以在必要时平衡两个子网之间的流量。实验结果表明，我们提出的架构确保了高吞吐量和低延迟的NoC系统。通过应用流量转换器，可以改善数据包延迟。

papers.title: Formal Verification of Resource Synchronization Protocol Implementations: A Case Study in RTEMS.
papers.abstract: To avoid race conditions and ensure data integrity, resource synchronization protocols have been widely studied in real-time systems for decades, providing systematical policies to guarantee a bound on priority inversion-induced blocking time and the avoidance of deadlocks. However, the corresponding realization is often based on assumed abstractions and necessary adaptions in a real-time operating system, by which the theoretically proven properties of such a protocol may not be delivered, leading to potential mismatches. To prevent such mismatches, in this work, we propose to contract the obligations of involved primitives and operations, and apply the deductive verification on a corresponding implementation. To this end, we present a modularized verification framework and demonstrate its applicability by verifying the official implementation of the immediate ceiling priority protocol (ICPP) and the multiprocessor resource sharing protocol (MrsP) in RTEMS, resulting in the discovery of long-stayed mismatches for both synchronization protocols. To resolve them, we provide a possible remedy for the ICPP and an additional precondition regarding nested locking for the MrsP.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了避免竞争条件并确保数据完整性，资源同步协议已在实时系统中广泛研究了数十年，提供系统策略来保证优先级反转引起的阻塞时间的限制并避免死锁。然而，相应的实现通常基于实时操作系统中假设的抽象和必要的适应，由此可能无法交付此类协议的理论上证明的属性，从而导致潜在的不匹配。为了防止这种不匹配，在这项工作中，我们建议收缩所涉及的原语和操作的义务，并对相应的实现应用演绎验证。为此，我们提出了一个模块化的验证框架，并通过验证立即上限优先级协议（ICPP）和多处理器资源共享协议（MrsP）在RTEMS中的正式实现来证明其适用性，从而发现这两种同步协议的长期不匹配。为了解决这些问题，我们为 ICPP 提供了可能的补救措施，并为 MrsP 提供了有关嵌套锁定的附加前提条件。

papers.title: GNN-RE: Graph Neural Networks for Reverse Engineering of Gate-Level Netlists.
papers.abstract: This work introduces a generic, machine learning (ML)-based platform for functional reverse engineering (RE) of circuits. Our proposed platform <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> leverages the notion of graph neural networks (GNNs) to: 1) represent and analyze flattened/unstructured gate-level netlists; 2) automatically identify the boundaries between the modules or subcircuits implemented in such netlists; and 3) classify the subcircuits based on their functionalities. For GNNs in general, each graph node is tailored to learn about its own features and its neighboring nodes, which is a powerful approach for the detection of any kind of subgraphs of interest. For <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> , in particular, each node represents a gate and is initialized with a feature vector that reflects on the functional and structural properties of its neighboring gates. <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> also learns the global structure of the circuit, which facilitates identifying the boundaries between subcircuits in a flattened netlist. Initially, to provide high-quality data for training of <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> , we deploy a comprehensive dataset of foundational designs/components with differing functionalities, implementation styles, bit widths, and interconnections. <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> is then tested on the unseen shares of this custom dataset, as well as the EPFL benchmarks, the ISCAS-85 benchmarks, and the 74X series benchmarks. <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> achieves an average accuracy of 98.82% in terms of mapping individual gates to modules, all without any manual intervention or postprocessing. We also release our code and source data.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了一种基于机器学习 (ML) 的通用平台，用于电路的功能逆向工程 (RE)。我们提出的平台 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> 利用图神经网络 (GNN) 的概念来： 1) 表示和分析扁平/非结构化门级网表； 2）自动识别在此类网表中实现的模块或子电路之间的边界； 3）根据子电路的功能对其进行分类。一般来说，对于 GNN，每个图节点都经过定制，以了解其自身的特征及其相邻节点，这是检测任何类型的感兴趣子图的强大方法。特别是对于 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> ，每个节点表示一个门，并使用反映其相邻门的功能和结构属性的特征向量进行初始化。 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> 还可以学习电路的全局结构，这有助于识别扁平网表中子电路之间的边界。最初，为了为 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> 的训练提供高质量的数据，我们部署了具有不同功能、实现风格、位宽和互连的基础设计/组件的综合数据集。然后，在此自定义数据集的未见部分以及 EPFL 基准、ISCAS-85 基准和 74X 系列基准上测试 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace>。 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">GNN-RE</monospace> 在将各个门映射到模块方面实现了 98.82% 的平均准确度，所有这些都无需任何手动干预或后处理。我们还发布了我们的代码和源数据。

papers.title: HERO: Pbit High-Radix Optical Switch Based on Integrated Silicon Photonics for Data Center.
papers.abstract: To establish flatten networks and accomplish rapid and efficient communications in the future hyper-scale data centers, HERO, a high-radix optical switch based on integrated silicon photonics, is proposed in this work. The architecture of HERO, including the switch fabric, switch interface, and switch controller, is described in detail. Two new switch control approaches: 1) split-transaction predictive control and 2) wavelength-group switching, are developed. The efficient control together with the optimized high-radix integrated optical switch fabrics help HERO achieve over 1 Pbps switching capacity. Even for small packets, such as 64–256 B Ethernet packets, the maximal utilization of the switch can reach up to 83%, and the throughput can approximate 1 Pbps. Further design explorations on the packet length and some key configurations, including the number of wavelengths and wavelength groups, are also conducted in this work, paving the way to the design of high-performance flatten data-center networks in the future.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了在未来的超大规模数据中心建立扁平化网络并实现快速高效的通信，本文提出了一种基于集成硅光子学的高基数光开关HERO。详细描述了HERO的体系结构，包括交换结构、交换接口和交换控制器。开发了两种新的开关控制方法：1）分离事务预测控制和2）波长组切换。高效的控制加上优化的高基集成光交换结构帮助 HERO 实现了超过 1 Pbps 的交换容量。即使对于小数据包，例如64-256 B以太网数据包，交换机的最大利用率也可以达到83%，吞吐量可以接近1 Pbps。这项工作还对数据包长度和一些关键配置（包括波长和波长组）进行了进一步的设计探索，为未来高性能扁平化数据中心网络的设计铺平了道路。

papers.title: Heterogeneous FPGA Architecture Using Threshold Logic Gates for Improved Area, Power, and Performance.
papers.abstract: The flexibility of field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) is attributed to the reconfigurability of their basic logic elements (BLEs). Traditionally, the BLEs are comprised of one or more lookup tables (LUTs) of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> inputs, that are designed to implement Boolean functions of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> or fewer inputs. In an attempt to reduce the area and power consumption that comes from using LUTs, a number of complex LUT architectures have been reported. Although most of the proposed complex LUT architectures have resulted in reduced area and power, this has always been at cost of the decreased performance. This article proposes a new FPGA architecture, called threshold logic FPGA (TLFPGA), which results in significant improvement in performance, power, and area (PPA). TLFPGA is comprised of a combination of LUTs and a new type of BLE referred to as a threshold logic cell (TLC) (Muroga, 1987). Although TLCs implement a relatively small subset of Boolean functions known as threshold functions (Muroga, 1987), they require far fewer registers and multiplexers than an LUT, and are also significantly faster. This article describes the architecture of the TLFPGA and a technology mapping algorithm tailored for a TLFGA. On average, TLFPGA designs use 18% fewer registers and multiplexers, which improves the collective area of BLEs by approximately 16%, power by 14%, and performance by 5%. The improvements have been demonstrated in both 40 and 28 nm technologies for ISCAS-85 circuits as well as practical circuits, using industry-standard flows. The improvements were also demonstrated using a layout of the architecture.
papers.abstract_zh: 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的灵活性归因于其基本逻辑元件 (BLE) 的可重构性。传统上，BLE 由一个或多个 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 输入的查找表 (LUT) 组成，旨在实现<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 或更少输入的布尔函数。为了减少使用 LUT 所带来的面积和功耗，已经报道了许多复杂的 LUT 架构。尽管大多数提出的复杂 LUT 架构都导致了面积和功耗的减少，但这始终是以性能下降为代价的。本文提出了一种新的 FPGA 架构，称为阈值逻辑 FPGA (TLFPGA)，它在性能、功耗和面积 (PPA) 方面实现了显着改进。 TLFPGA 由 LUT 和一种称为阈值逻辑单元 (TLC) 的新型 BLE 组合而成（Muroga，1987）。尽管 TLC 实现了称为阈值函数的相对较小的布尔函数子集（Muroga，1987），但它们需要的寄存器和多路复用器比 LUT 少得多，而且速度也快得多。本文介绍了 TLFPGA 的架构以及为 TLFGA 量身定制的技术映射算法。平均而言，TLFPGA 设计使用的寄存器和多路复用器减少了 18%，这将 BLE 的总面积提高了约 16%，功耗提高了 14%，性能提高了 5%。这些改进已在 ISCAS-85 电路的 40 和 28 nm 技术以及实际电路中使用行业标准流程得到了证明。还使用架构布局演示了这些改进。

papers.title: High-Performance Accurate and Approximate Multipliers for FPGA-Based Hardware Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Multiplication is one of the widely used arithmetic operations in a variety of applications, such as image/video processing and machine learning. FPGA vendors provide high-performance multipliers in the form of DSP blocks. These multipliers are not only limited in number and have fixed locations on FPGAs but can also create additional routing delays and may prove inefficient for smaller bit-width multiplications. Therefore, FPGA vendors additionally provide optimized soft IP cores for multiplication. However, in this work, we advocate that these soft multiplier IP cores for FPGAs still need better designs to provide high-performance and resource efficiency. Toward this, we present generic area-optimized, low-latency accurate, and approximate softcore multiplier architectures, which exploit the underlying architectural features of FPGAs, i.e., lookup table (LUT) structures and fast-carry chains to reduce the overall critical path delay (CPD) and resource utilization of multipliers. Compared to Xilinx multiplier LogiCORE IP, our proposed unsigned and signed accurate architecture provides up to 25% and 53% reduction in LUT utilization, respectively, for different sizes of multipliers. Moreover, with our unsigned approximate multiplier architectures, a reduction of up to 51% in the CPD can be achieved with an insignificant loss in output accuracy when compared with the LogiCORE IP. For illustration, we have deployed the proposed multiplier architecture in accelerators used in image and video applications, and evaluated them for area and performance gains. Our library of accurate and approximate multipliers is opensource and available online at <uri>https://cfaed.tu-dresden.de/pd-downloads</uri> to fuel further research and development in this area, facilitate reproducible research, and thereby enabling a new research direction for the FPGA community.
papers.abstract_zh: 乘法是图像/视频处理和机器学习等各种应用中广泛使用的算术运算之一。 FPGA 供应商以 DSP 模块的形式提供高性能乘法器。这些乘法器不仅数量有限并且在 FPGA 上具有固定位置，而且还会产生额外的布线延迟，并且对于较小位宽的乘法可能效率低下。因此，FPGA供应商另外提供了针对乘法优化的软IP核。然而，在这项工作中，我们主张这些用于 FPGA 的软乘法器 IP 核仍然需要更好的设计来提供高性能和资源效率。为此，我们提出了通用的面积优化、低延迟精确和近似软核乘法器架构，该架构利用 FPGA 的底层架构特征，即查找表 (LUT) 结构和快速进位链来减少乘法器的整体关键路径延迟 (CPD) 和资源利用率。与 Xilinx 乘法器 LogiCORE IP 相比，我们提出的无符号和有符号精确架构对于不同大小的乘法器，LUT 利用率分别降低了 25% 和 53%。此外，与 LogiCORE IP 相比，利用我们的无符号近似乘法器架构，可以将 CPD 降低高达 51%，而输出精度的损失却微乎其微。为了便于说明，我们在图像和视频应用中使用的加速器中部署了所提出的乘法器架构，并评估了它们的面积和性能增益。我们的精确和近似乘法器库是开源的，可在 <uri>https://cfaed.tu-dresden.de/pd-downloads</uri> 在线获取，以推动该领域的进一步研究和开发，促进可重复研究，从而为 FPGA 社区开辟新的研究方向。

papers.title: HiMap: Fast and Scalable High-Quality Mapping on CGRA via Hierarchical Abstraction.
papers.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable array (CGRA) has emerged as a promising hardware accelerator due to the excellent balance between reconfigurability, performance, and energy efficiency. The performance of a CGRA strongly depends on the existence of a high-quality compiler to map the application kernels on the architecture. Unfortunately, the state-of-the-art compiler technology falls short in generating high-performance mapping within an acceptable compilation time, especially with increasing CGRA size. We propose HiMap —a fast and scalable CGRA mapping approach—that is also adept at producing close-to-optimal solutions for regular computational kernels prevalent in existing and emerging application domains. The key strategy behind HiMap ’s efficiency and scalability is to exploit the regularity in the computation by employing a virtual systolic array (VSA) as an intermediate abstraction layer in a hierarchical mapping. HiMap first maps the loop iterations of the kernel onto a VSA and then distills out the unique patterns in the mapping. These unique patterns are subsequently mapped onto subspaces of the physical CGRA. They are arranged together according to the systolic array mapping to create a complete mapping of the kernel. Experimental results confirm that HiMap can generate application mappings that hit the performance envelope of the CGRA. HiMap offers $17.3\times $ and $5\times $ improvement in performance and energy efficiency of the mappings compared to the state of the art. The compilation time of HiMap for near-optimal mappings is less than 15 min for 64 $\times $ 64 CGRA while existing approaches take days to generate inferior mappings.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于可重构性、性能和能源效率之间的出色平衡，粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）已成为一种有前景的硬件加速器。 CGRA 的性能很大程度上取决于是否存在高质量编译器来将应用程序内核映射到架构上。不幸的是，最先进的编译器技术无法在可接受的编译时间内生成高性能映射，尤其是在 CGRA 大小不断增加的情况下。我们提出了 HiMap——一种快速且可扩展的 CGRA 映射方法——它也擅长为现有和新兴应用领域中流行的常规计算内核生成接近最优的解决方案。 HiMap 的效率和可扩展性背后的关键策略是通过使用虚拟脉动阵列 (VSA) 作为分层映射中的中间抽象层来利用计算中的规律性。 HiMap 首先将内核的循环迭代映射到 VSA，然后提取映射中的独特模式。这些独特的模式随后被映射到物理 CGRA 的子空间上。它们根据脉动数组映射排列在一起，以创建内核的完整映射。实验结果证实 HiMap 可以生成达到 CGRA 性能范围的应用程序映射。 HiMap 提供<内联公式 xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> $17.3\times $ 和 与现有技术相比，映射的性能和能源效率提高了 $5\times $ 。 HiMap 近乎最佳映射的编译时间对于 64 个 $\times $ 64 CGRA 而现有方法需要几天时间才能生成较差的映射。

papers.title: Identifying Reliability-Critical Primary Inputs of Combinational Circuits Based on the Model of Gate-Sensitive Attributes.
papers.abstract: The identification of reliability-critical primary input leads (RCPIs) plays an important role in the testing and prediction of reliability boundaries of logic circuits. This article presents a gate-sensitive-attributes-based approach to estimate the criticality of the primary input leads in combinational circuits to their reliability. Oriented to the input vector, a subcircuit-based traversal method marks the critical input leads of each gate in a circuit. Gate-sensitive attributes and a reverse recursive algorithm quantify the effect of each RCPI on circuit reliability under the input vector. A parallel calculation method based on subcircuits with only one primary output reduces the computational complexity to accelerate the calculation process. Similarity-based clustering avoids unnecessary calculations, and a self-adaptive strategy is used to check convergence. Experimental results on benchmark circuits show that the average accuracy of this approach is 0.9634 with Monte Carlo (MC) as the reference and it is 3445 times faster than the MC on average while its average memory cost is 1.67 greater than the MC model. Although the fitness of the worst input vector obtained by other reference methods is 1.09 times better than that of this approach on average, this approach is approximately 21 times faster than that reference method on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 可靠性关键初级输入引线（RCPI）的识别在逻辑电路可靠性边界的测试和预测中发挥着重要作用。本文提出了一种基于门敏感属性的方法来估计组合电路中主输入引线对其可靠性的重要性。面向输入向量，基于子电路的遍历方法标记了电路中每个门的关键输入引线。门敏感属性和反向递归算法量化了输入向量下每个 RCPI 对电路可靠性的影响。一种基于只有一个主输出的子电路的并行计算方法降低了计算复杂度，加速了计算过程。基于相似性的聚类避免了不必要的计算，并使用自适应策略来检查收敛性。基准电路的实验结果表明，以蒙特卡罗（MC）为参考，该方法的平均精度为0.9634，平均比MC模型快3445倍，而平均内存成本比MC模型高1.67。虽然其他参考方法获得的最差输入向量的适应度平均比该方法好1.09倍，但该方法平均比参考方法快约21倍。

papers.title: Improving Fault Tolerance for Reliable DNN Using Boundary-Aware Activation.
papers.abstract: In this article, we approach to construct reliable deep neural networks (DNNs) for safety-critical artificial intelligent applications. We propose to modify rectified linear unit (ReLU), a commonly used activation function in DNNs, to tolerate the faults incurred by bit-flip perturbation on weights. Through theoretic analysis of the fault propagation in the layers with ReLU activation, we observe that bounding the output of ReLU activation can help to tolerate the weight faults. Then, we propose a novel ReLU design called boundary-aware ReLU (BReLU) to improve the reliability of DNNs, in which an upper bound of ReLU is determined such that the deviation between the boundary and original outputs cannot affect the final result. We propose a gradient-ascent-based algorithm to find the boundaries for BReLU activations of all DNN layers. Without retraining the network, our approach is cost effective and practical when deployed in safety-critical artificial intelligent systems. Detailed experiments and real-life application benchmarking demonstrate that our approach can improve the accuracy of DNN VGG16 from 16.7% to 82.6% on average assuming the practical weight faults, with only 13% memory and 2.78% time overhead, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们为安全关键的人工智能应用构建可靠的深度神经网络（DNN）。我们建议修改修正线性单元（ReLU）（DNN 中常用的激活函数），以容忍权重位翻转扰动引起的故障。通过对 ReLU 激活层中的故障传播进行理论分析，我们观察到限制 ReLU 激活的输出有助于容忍权重故障。然后，我们提出了一种称为边界感知ReLU（BReLU）的新颖ReLU设计，以提高DNN的可靠性，其中确定ReLU的上限，使得边界和原始输出之间的偏差不会影响最终结果。我们提出了一种基于梯度上升的算法来查找所有 DNN 层的 BReLU 激活的边界。在不重新训练网络的情况下，我们的方法在部署在安全关键型人工智能系统中时具有成本效益且实用。详细的实验和实际应用基准测试表明，假设实际权重错误，我们的方法可以将 DNN VGG16 的准确率平均从 16.7% 提高到 82.6%，而内存和时间开销分别仅为 13% 和 2.78%。

papers.title: Intermittent-Aware Distributed Concurrency Control.
papers.abstract: Internet of Things (IoT) devices are gradually adopting battery-less, energy harvesting solutions, thereby driving the development of an intermittent computing paradigm to accumulate computation progress across multiple power cycles. While many attempts have been made to enable standalone intermittent systems, little attention has focused on IoT networks formed by intermittent devices. We observe that the computation progress improved by distributed task concurrency in an intermittent network can be significantly offset by data unavailability due to frequent system failures. This article presents an intermittent-aware distributed concurrency control protocol which leverages existing data copies inherently created in the network to improve the computation progress of concurrently executed tasks. In particular, we propose a borrowing-based data management method to increase data availability and an intermittent two-phase commit procedure incorporated with distributed backward validation to ensure data consistency in the network. The proposed protocol was integrated into a FreeRTOS-extended intermittent operating system running on Texas Instruments devices. Experimental results show that the computation progress can be significantly improved, and this improvement is more apparent under weaker power, where more devices will remain offline for longer duration.
papers.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 设备逐渐采用无电池能量收集解决方案，从而推动间歇性计算范式的发展，以累积多个电源周期的计算进度。尽管人们已经做出了许多尝试来实现独立的间歇性系统，但很少有人关注由间歇性设备形成的物联网网络。我们观察到，间歇性网络中分布式任务并发所提高的计算进度可能会因频繁的系统故障而导致的数据不可用而被显着抵消。本文提出了一种间歇感知分布式并发控制协议，该协议利用网络中固有创建的现有数据副本来提高并发执行任务的计算进度。特别是，我们提出了一种基于借用的数据管理方法来提高数据可用性，以及一种与分布式向后验证相结合的间歇性两阶段提交过程，以确保网络中的数据一致性。所提出的协议已集成到在德州仪器 (TI) 设备上运行的 FreeRTOS 扩展间歇性操作系统中。实验结果表明，计算进度可以得到显着提升，并且这种提升在较弱的功率下更加明显，此时更多的设备将保持离线状态更长的时间。

papers.title: iNVMFS: An Efficient File System for NVRAM-Based Intermittent Computing Devices.
papers.abstract: Developing toward battery-less, energy-harvesting designs is a promising direction for sensor-scale devices. The recent introduction of byte-addressable, nonvolatile memory (NVRAM) enables intermittent computing, which preserves as much program progress across power interruptions as possible using fine-grained checkpoints. Sensing applications strongly demand local storage for near-data processing, and there is no exception for intermittent computing devices. While checkpointing on program progress is being studied recently, there is little work regarding how sensor file systems support intermittent computing. On power recovery, although the program progress is reverted to the latest checkpoint, the storage state stays at the instant of power loss. To remedy this problem, we present a lightweight file system for efficient operations on files and checkpoints. Our design exploits the byte addressability of NVRAM and uses as much in-place byte writing as possible while guaranteeing the safety of checkpoint operations. We evaluated our design against two prior checkpoint-enabled file systems, and results show that on average, our design reduced the total time overhead and energy consumption by 77% and 78%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 向无电池、能量收集设计发展是传感器规模设备的一个有前途的方向。最近推出的字节可寻址非易失性存储器 (NVRAM) 可实现间歇性计算，从而使用细粒度检查点在电源中断时尽可能多地保留程序进度。传感应用强烈需要本地存储来进行近数据处理，间歇性计算设备也不例外。虽然最近正在研究程序进度的检查点，但关于传感器文件系统如何支持间歇性计算的工作却很少。电源恢复时，虽然程序进度恢复到最新的检查点，但存储状态仍保持在断电瞬间。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个轻量级文件系统，用于对文件和检查点进行高效操作。我们的设计利用了 NVRAM 的字节寻址能力，在保证检查点操作安全的同时，尽可能多地使用就地字节写入。我们针对两个先前启用检查点的文件系统评估了我们的设计，结果表明，我们的设计平均将总时间开销和能耗分别减少了 77% 和 78%。

papers.title: Locking Protocols for Parallel Real-Time Tasks With Semaphores Under Federated Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Suspension-based locks are widely used in real-time systems to coordinate simultaneous accesses to exclusive shared resources. Although suspension-based locks have been well studied for sequential real-time tasks, little work has been done on this topic for parallel real-time tasks. This article for the first time studies the problem of how to extend existing sequential-task locking protocols and their analysis techniques to the parallel task model. More specifically, we extend two locking protocols OMLP and OMIP, which were designed for clustered scheduling of sequential real-time tasks, to federated scheduling of parallel real-time tasks. We present corresponding blocking analysis techniques, and develop path-oriented techniques to analyze and count blocking time. Schedulability tests with different efficiency and accuracy are further developed. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our proposed approaches against the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于暂停的锁广泛应用于实时系统中，以协调对独占共享资源的同时访问。尽管针对顺序实时任务对基于悬浮的锁进行了深入研究，但针对 并行实时任务。本文首次研究了如何将现有的顺序任务锁定协议及其分析技术扩展到并行任务模型的问题。更具体地说，我们将两个锁定协议 OMLP 和 OMIP 扩展为 连续 实时任务的集群调度，以联合调度 并行实时任务。我们提出了相应的阻塞分析技术，并开发了面向路径的技术来分析和统计阻塞时间。进一步开发了不同效率和精度的可调度性测试。进行实验是为了评估我们提出的方法与最先进方法的性能。

papers.title: LoCoMOBO: A Local Constrained Multiobjective Bayesian Optimization for Analog Circuit Sizing.
papers.abstract: A local constrained multiobjective Bayesian optimization (LoCoMOBO) method is introduced to address automatic sizing and tradeoff exploration for analog and RF integrated circuits (ICs). LoCoMOBO applies to constrained optimization problems utilizing multiple Gaussian process (GP) models that approximate the objective and constraint functions locally in the search space. It searches for potential pareto optimal solutions within trust regions of the search space using only a few time-consuming simulations. The trust regions are adaptively updated during the optimization process based on feasibility and hypervolume metrics. In contrast to mainstream Bayesian optimization approaches, LoCoMOBO uses a new acquisition function that can provide multiple query points, therefore allowing for parallel execution of costly simulations. GP inference is also enhanced by using GPU acceleration in order to handle highly constrained problems that require large sample budgets. Combined with a framework for schematic parametrization and simulator calls, LoCoMOBO provides improved performance tradeoffs and sizing results on three real-world circuit examples, while reducing the total runtime up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\times 43$ </tex-math></inline-formula> times compared to state-of-the-art methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 引入局部约束多目标贝叶斯优化 (LoCoMOBO) 方法来解决模拟和射频集成电路 (IC) 的自动规模调整和权衡探索问题。 LoCoMOBO 适用于利用多个高斯过程 (GP) 模型的约束优化问题，这些模型在搜索空间中局部逼近目标函数和约束函数。它仅使用一些耗时的模拟来在搜索空间的信任区域内搜索潜在的帕累托最优解。信任区域在优化过程中根据可行性和超体积指标进行自适应更新。与主流贝叶斯优化方法相比，LoCoMOBO 使用新的采集函数，可以提供多个查询点，因此允许并行执行昂贵的模拟。 GP 推理还通过使用 GPU 加速得到增强，以处理需要大量样本预算的高度受限问题。结合原理图参数化和模拟器调用的框架，LoCoMOBO 在三个实际电路示例中提供了改进的性能权衡和调整结果，同时将总运行时间减少到 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math与最先进的方法相比，notation="LaTeX">$\times 43$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 倍。

papers.title: LOOPLock 2.0: An Enhanced Cyclic Logic Locking Approach.
papers.abstract: LOOPLock is the state-of-the-art cyclic logic locking method in hardware security. LOOPLock is able to invalidate SAT Attack, Removal Attack, and CycSAT simultaneously by introducing two types of cycle pairs in a circuit. In this work, we analyze LOOPLock’s locking mechanism and propose an attacking approach based on locking structure analysis. Furthermore, to defend the new attack, we propose LOOPLock 2.0, which strengthens the original cyclic logic locking method—LOOPLock. Experimental results show the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed attacking approach to LOOPLock and the high defense capability of LOOPLock 2.0.
papers.abstract_zh: LOOPLock是硬件安全领域最先进的循环逻辑锁定方法。 LOOPLock通过在电路中引入两种类型的循环对，能够同时使SAT攻击、移除攻击和CycSAT无效。在这项工作中，我们分析了LOOPLock的锁定机制，并提出了一种基于锁定结构分析的攻击方法。此外，为了防御新的攻击，我们提出了LOOPLock 2.0，它增强了原始循环逻辑锁定方法LOOPLock。实验结果表明了所提出的LOOPLock攻击方法的效率和有效性以及LOOPLock 2.0的高防御能力。

papers.title: MARS: Multimacro Architecture SRAM CIM-Based Accelerator With Co-Designed Compressed Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) play a key role in deep learning applications. However, the large storage overheads and the substantial computational cost of CNNs are problematic in hardware accelerators. Computing-in-memory (CIM) architecture has demonstrated great potential to effectively compute large-scale matrix–vector multiplication. However, the intensive multiply and accumulation (MAC) operations executed on CIM macros remain bottlenecks for further improvement of energy efficiency and throughput. To reduce computational costs, model compression is a widely studied method to shrink the model size. For implementation in a static random access memory (SRAM) CIM–based accelerator, the model compression algorithm must consider the hardware limitations of CIM macros. In this study, a software and hardware co-design approach is proposed to design MARS, a SRAM-based CIM (SRAM CIM)-based CNN accelerator that can utilize multiple SRAM CIM macros as processing units and support a sparse CNN, and an SRAM CIM-aware model compression algorithm that considers a CIM architecture to reduce the number of network parameters. With the proposed hardware software co-designed method, MARS can reach over 700 and 400 FPS for CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, respectively. In addition, MARS achieves 52.3 and 88.2 TOPs/W in VGG16 and ResNet18, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在深度学习应用中发挥着关键作用。然而，CNN 的大量存储开销和大量计算成本在硬件加速器中存在问题。内存计算 (CIM) 架构已展现出有效计算大规模矩阵向量乘法的巨大潜力。然而，在 CIM 宏上执行的密集乘法和累加 (MAC) 运算仍然是进一步提高能源效率和吞吐量的瓶颈。为了降低计算成本，模型压缩是一种广泛研究的缩小模型大小的方法。为了在基于静态随机存取存储器 (SRAM) CIM 的加速器中实现，模型压缩算法必须考虑 CIM 宏的硬件限制。在本研究中，提出了一种软件和硬件协同设计方法来设计MARS，一种基于SRAM CIM（SRAM CIM）的CNN加速器，可以利用多个SRAM CIM宏作为处理单元并支持稀疏CNN，以及一种SRAM CIM感知模型压缩算法，该算法考虑CIM架构以减少网络参数的数量。通过所提出的硬件软件协同设计方法，MARS 对于 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 可以分别达到超过 700 FPS 和 400 FPS。此外，MARS 在 VGG16 和 ResNet18 中分别实现了 52.3 和 88.2 TOPs/W。

papers.title: MDD: A Unified Model-Driven Design Framework for Embedded Control Software.
papers.abstract: Model-driven methods are widely used in embedded control software development. Current design tools, such as Ptolemy-II and Simulink, have strong modeling capability but their simulation and code generation functionalities are challenged by the increasing complexity of control requirements. For simulation, emulating the triggering of the actor leads to additional time overhead and speed degradation. For code generation, generating redundant content degrades the code quality. Besides, current tools do not have a unified interface, which makes it difficult to cooperation. In this article, we propose a unified model-driven design framework MDD to facilitate embedded control software development. MDD can support the unification of models built by different modeling tools for high-efficiency simulation and high-quality code generation. The MDD framework supports the expansion of more modeling tools, and also supports the expansion of more uses, such as unified testing and verification. First, it offers a model intermediate representation (MIR) and several corresponding parsers, which facilitate a unified representation and cooperation for different design tools. Then, based on data flow schedule analysis of the original MIR, intermediate code representation will be generated for optimized code synthesis. Finally, a variety of code translators will synthesize the intermediate code representation into the code of actual use, such as code for simulation and code for deployment. For evaluation, we enhance two widely used design tools in industry, Ptolemy-II and Simulink, and apply them on the implementation of several benchmark models and a real-world self-driving control software of our industrial collaborator. Using MDD can help reduce their simulation time by 98.9% and 92.6%, the generated code by 99.7% and 69.9% in the number of lines, and 94.3% and 34.3% in code execution time, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 模型驱动方法广泛应用于嵌入式控制软件开发。当前的设计工具，如Ptolemy-II和Simulink，具有强大的建模能力，但它们的仿真和代码生成功能受到控制需求日益复杂性的挑战。对于模拟来说，模拟参与者的触发会导致额外的时间开销和速度下降。对于代码生成来说，生成冗余内容会降低代码质量。此外，目前的工具没有统一的界面，导致协作困难。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的模型驱动设计框架MDD来促进嵌入式控制软件的开发。 MDD可以支持不同建模工具构建的模型的统一，以实现高效仿真和高质量代码生成。 MDD框架支持扩展更多的建模工具，也支持扩展更多的用途，比如统一测试、验证等。首先，它提供了模型中间表示（MIR）和几个相应的解析器，有助于不同设计工具的统一表示和协作。然后，基于原始MIR的数据流调度分析，将生成中间代码表示以优化代码合成。最后，各种代码翻译器会将中间代码表示合成为实际使用的代码，例如用于模拟的代码和用于部署的代码。为了进行评估，我们增强了两种在工业中广泛使用的设计工具：Ptolemy-II 和 Simulink，并将它们应用于我们工业合作者的几个基准模型和实际自动驾驶控制软件的实现。使用 MDD 可以帮助将仿真时间分别减少 98.9% 和 92.6%，生成的代码行数分别减少 99.7% 和 69.9%，代码执行时间分别减少 94.3% 和 34.3%。

papers.title: MFA-MTJ Model: Magnetic-Field-Aware Compact Model of pMTJ for Robust STT-MRAM Design.
papers.abstract: The popularity of perpendicular magnetic tunnel junction (pMTJ)-based spin-transfer torque magnetic random access memories (STT-MRAMs) is growing very fast. The performance of such memories is very sensitive to magnetic fields, including both internal and external ones. This article presents a magnetic-field-aware compact model of pMTJ, named the MFA-magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ) model, for magnetic/electrical co-simulation of MTJ/CMOS circuits. Magnetic measurement data of MTJ devices, with diameters ranging from 35 to 175 nm, are used to calibrate an in-house magnetic coupling model. This model is subsequently integrated into our developed compact pMTJ model, which is implemented in Verilog-A. The superiority of the proposed MFA-MTJ model for device/circuit co-design of STT-MRAM is demonstrated by simulating a single pMTJ as well as STT-MRAM full circuits. The design space is explored under PVT variations and various configurations of magnetic fields.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于垂直磁隧道结 (pMTJ) 的自旋转移矩磁性随机存取存储器 (STT-MRAM) 的普及速度非常快。此类存储器的性能对磁场（包括内部磁场和外部磁场）非常敏感。本文提出了一种 pMTJ 的磁场感知紧凑模型，称为 MFA-磁性隧道结 (MTJ) 模型，用于 MTJ/CMOS 电路的磁/电联合仿真。直径范围为 35 至 175 nm 的 MTJ 器件的磁测量数据用于校准内部磁耦合模型。该模型随后被集成到我们开发的紧凑型 pMTJ 模型中，该模型在 Verilog-A 中实现。通过模拟单个 pMTJ 以及 STT-MRAM 全电路，证明了所提出的用于 STT-MRAM 器件/电路协同设计的 MFA-MTJ 模型的优越性。在 PVT 变化和各种磁场配置下探索设计空间。

papers.title: MPFA: An Efficient Multiple Faults-Based Persistent Fault Analysis Method for Low-Cost FIA.
papers.abstract: In recent studies, a fault analysis method, called persistent fault analysis (PFA), is proposed for cracking block ciphers. Unlike widely used differential fault analysis methods, PFA does not require correct cihpertexts and precise time control of fault injection. The existing PFA methods mainly assume single fault, i.e., the fault injection process induces a single fault in the target cipher devices. However, the existing low-cost fault injection attack (FIA) techniques, such as clock glitch injection and electromagnetic pulse (EMP) injection usually induce multiple faults per injection. Given multiple faults, the existing PFA methods are either not applicable or faced with high computational complexity in practice. In this article, a new PFA method, called MPFA, is proposed for multiple persistent faults, which reduces both the computational complexity and the required ciphertexts. MPFA can be applied to the ciphertexts-only attack scenario, where all fault positions, fault values, and fault quantity are unknown. The experiments show that compared to the existing PFA methods, the MPFA method reduces the required ciphertexts for cracking AES by at least 57.5% and reduces the computational complexity <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$NF^{16}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> times for <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$NF$ </tex-math></inline-formula> faults. The proposed MPFA is also evaluated on the block ciphers LED and PRINCE. Moreover, a real EMP FIA is carried out and the key of AES-128 is successfully cracked by the MPFA method, demonstrating its validity and efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 在最近的研究中，提出了一种称为持久故障分析（PFA）的故障分析方法来破解分组密码。与广泛使用的差分故障分析方法不同，PFA 不需要正确的密文和精确的故障注入时间控制。现有的PFA方法主要假设单一故障，即故障注入过程在目标密码装置中诱发单一故障。然而，现有的低成本故障注入攻击（FIA）技术，例如时钟毛刺注入和电磁脉冲（EMP）注入通常每次注入都会引发多个故障。由于存在多种缺陷，现有的 PFA 方法要么不适用，要么在实践中面临较高的计算复杂度。在本文中，针对多个持续性故障提出了一种新的 PFA 方法，称为 MPFA，该方法降低了计算复杂度和所需的密文。 MPFA适用于所有故障位置、故障值、故障数量未知的纯密文攻击场景。实验表明，与现有的PFA方法相比，MPFA方法将破解AES所需的密文减少了至少57.5%，并降低了计算复杂度 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$NF^{16}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 次 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$NF$ </tex-math></inline-formula>缺点。所提出的 MPFA 还在分组密码 LED 和 PRINCE 上进行了评估。并进行了真实的EMP FIA，利用MPFA方法成功破解了AES-128密钥，验证了其有效性和效率。

papers.title: Noise Sensitivity-Based Energy Efficient and Robust Adversary Detection in Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Neural have achieved remarkable performance in computer vision, however, they are vulnerable to adversarial examples. Adversarial examples are inputs that have been carefully perturbed to fool classifier networks, while appearing unchanged to humans. Based on prior works on detecting adversaries, we propose a structured methodology of augmenting a deep neural network (DNN) with a detector subnetwork. We use adversarial noise sensitivity (ANS), a novel metric for measuring the adversarial gradient contribution of different intermediate layers of a network. Based on the ANS value, we append a detector to the most sensitive layer. In prior works, more complex detectors were added to a DNN, increasing the inference computational cost of the model. In contrast, our structured and strategic addition of a detector to a DNN reduces the complexity of the model while making the overall network adversarially resilient. Through comprehensive white-box and black-box experiments on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, we show that our method improves state-of-the-art detector robustness against adversarial examples. Furthermore, we validate the energy efficiency of our proposed adversarial detection methodology through an extensive energy analysis on various hardware scalable CMOS accelerator platforms. We also demonstrate the effects of quantization on our detector-appended networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络在计算机视觉方面取得了显着的性能，但它们很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。对抗性示例是经过精心扰动以愚弄分类器网络的输入，而对人类来说似乎没有变化。基于先前检测对手的工作，我们提出了一种用检测器子网络增强深度神经网络（DNN）的结构化方法。我们使用对抗性噪声敏感性（ANS），这是一种用于测量网络不同中间层的对抗性梯度贡献的新颖指标。根据 ANS 值，我们将检测器附加到最敏感的层。在之前的工作中，DNN 中添加了更复杂的检测器，增加了模型的推理计算成本。相比之下，我们在 DNN 中结构化和战略性地添加检测器降低了模型的复杂性，同时使整个网络具有对抗性弹性。通过对 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 进行全面的白盒和黑盒实验，我们表明我们的方法提高了最先进的检测器针对对抗性示例的鲁棒性。此外，我们通过对各种硬件可扩展 CMOS 加速器平台进行广泛的能量分析，验证了我们提出的对抗性检测方法的能量效率。我们还演示了量化对附加检测器网络的影响。

papers.title: Nonuniform Compressive Sensing via Ohmic Voltage Attenuation: A Memristive Crossbar Design Approach Leveraging Intrinsic Computation.
papers.abstract: Compressive sensing (CS) is a promising technique for transmitting signals in power-critical applications such as Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Nonuniform CS optimizes this process by adjusting sampling frequency based on the relative importance levels characterized by the signal of interest. Recent advances have yielded energy-efficient hardware implementations of CS sampling, leveraging spin-based crossbar architectures for in-memory vector-matrix multiplication and through the use of probabilistic bit (p-bit) devices to generate tunable random outputs for writing the array. Thus, a region of interest is generated via column-ordered density of on-state devices. Herein, we propose a simple design for supplying inputs to the p-bit devices, based on Ohmic voltage attenuation occurring along the word lines of the crossbar array. The technique embeds some required computations to be conducted intrinsically by the cross-points of the memristive array, thus bypassing overheads of conventional instruction execution and eliminating the need for costly hardware components, such as lookup tables (LUTs) and data converters. The design is shown to be robust for various array sizes and parasitics while generating the appropriate tuning signals within a single clock cycle duration of 1.6 ns, and at an energy overhead of 333 fJ. Compared with a standard approach using LUTs and digital to-analog converters, the design herein achieves a 583-fold reduction in energy and 23-fold reduction in transistor count.
papers.abstract_zh: 压缩传感 (CS) 是一种很有前途的技术，用于在物联网 (IoT) 设备等功耗关键型应用中传输信号。非均匀 CS 通过根据感兴趣信号表征的相对重要性级别调整采样频率来优化此过程。最近的进展已经产生了 CS 采样的节能硬件实现，利用基于自旋的交叉架构进行内存中向量矩阵乘法，并通过使用概率位 (p 位) 设备来生成用于写入阵列的可调随机输出。因此，通过导通状态器件的列排序密度生成感兴趣区域。在此，我们提出了一种简单的设计，用于向 p 位器件提供输入，该设计基于沿交叉开关阵列的字线发生的欧姆电压衰减。该技术嵌入了一些由忆阻阵列的交叉点本质上进行的所需计算，从而绕过了传统指令执行的开销，并消除了对昂贵的硬件组件的需求，例如查找表（LUT）和数据转换器。事实证明，该设计对于各种阵列尺寸和寄生效应都具有鲁棒性，同时能够在 1.6 ns 的单个时钟周期持续时间内以 333 fJ 的能量开销生成适当的调谐信号。与使用 LUT 和数模转换器的标准方法相比，本文的设计实现了 583 倍的能耗降低和 23 倍的晶体管数量减少。
