papers.title: OCC: An Automated End-to-End Machine Learning Optimizing Compiler for Computing-In-Memory.
papers.abstract: Memristive devices promise an alternative approach toward non-Von Neumann architectures, where specific computational tasks are performed within the memory devices. In the machine learning (ML) domain, crossbar arrays of resistive devices have shown great promise for ML inference, as they allow for hardware acceleration of matrix multiplications. But, to enable widespread adoption of these novel architectures, it is critical to have an automatic compilation flow as opposed to relying on a manual mapping of specific kernels on the crossbar arrays. We demonstrate the programmability of memristor-based accelerators using the new compiler design principle of multilevel rewriting, where a hierarchy of abstractions lowers programs level-by-level and perform code transformations at the most suitable abstraction. In particular, we develop a prototype compiler, which progressively lowers a mathematical notation for tensor operations arising in ML workloads, to fixed-function memristor-based hardware blocks.
papers.abstract_zh: 忆阻器件有望为非冯·诺依曼架构提供一种替代方法，其中特定的计算任务在存储器件内执行。在机器学习 (ML) 领域，电阻器件的交叉阵列在 ML 推理方面展现出了巨大的前景，因为它们允许矩阵乘法的硬件加速。但是，为了广泛采用这些新颖的架构，拥有自动编译流程至关重要，而不是依赖于交叉开关阵列上特定内核的手动映射。我们使用多级重写的新编译器设计原理演示了基于忆阻器的加速器的可编程性，其中抽象层次结构逐级降低程序并以最合适的抽象执行代码转换。特别是，我们开发了一个原型编译器，它逐渐将 ML 工作负载中出现的张量运算的数学符号降低为基于固定功能忆阻器的硬件块。

papers.title: On Transferring Application Mapping Knowledge Between Differing MPSoC Architectures.
papers.abstract: The mapping of soft real-time applications onto a heterogeneous MPSoC target architecture is of high importance for meeting deadlines and minimizing secondary objectives like the consumed energy on the platform. In particular, for applications with input-dependent workload variation, hybrid application mapping (HAM) has crystallized itself as the state-of-the-art mapping approach that combines time-intensive design space exploration with lightweight run-time management. However, one general problem of HAM is that the explored mappings and models are highly specific to a certain target architecture. If the architecture is modified or changed (e.g., due to hardware upgrades, downgrades, or architectural degradation), the design-time optimization has to be repeated once again, which might take up to multiple weeks. As a remedy, this article proposes a twofold mapping transfer methodology that speeds up the design-time optimization for a novel or modified target architecture based on the knowledge we gained from the optimization for the original source architecture. First, we describe a greedy mapping transfer heuristic that provides feasible mappings for the new architecture in negligible optimization time. Second, we present a mapping refinement heuristic that improves these mappings even further while needing only a fraction of the optimization time of state-of-the-art approaches. As we show in the evaluation section, our approach can drastically speed up the convergence of the optimization for the novel architecture even if the sizes of the original and novel target architecture or the characteristics of the used resources differ significantly. Note that our approach assumes that the source and target architectures are both tile-based Network-on-Chip (NoC) meshes.
papers.abstract_zh: 将软实时应用映射到异构 MPSoC 目标架构对于满足最后期限和最大限度地减少次要目标（例如平台上的能耗）非常重要。特别是，对于具有输入相关工作负载变化的应用程序，混合应用程序映射 (HAM) 已将自身具体化为最先进的映射方法，它将时间密集型设计空间探索与轻量级运行时管理相结合。然而，HAM 的一个普遍问题是所探索的映射和模型对于特定的目标架构高度特定。如果架构被修改或更改（例如，由于硬件升级、降级或架构退化），则必须再次重复设计时优化，这可能需要长达数周的时间。作为补救措施，本文提出了一种双重映射传输方法，该方法基于我们从原始源架构优化中获得的知识，加快了新颖或修改后的目标架构的设计时优化。首先，我们描述了一种贪婪映射传输启发式算法，它可以在可忽略的优化时间内为新架构提供可行的映射。其次，我们提出了一种映射细化启发式方法，可以进一步改进这些映射，同时只需要最先进方法的一小部分优化时间。正如我们在评估部分所示，即使原始目标架构和新颖目标架构的大小或所用资源的特征存在显着差异，我们的方法也可以大大加快新颖架构优化的收敛速度。请注意，我们的方法假设源架构和目标架构都是基于图块的片上网络 (NoC) 网格。

papers.title: OPDB: A Scalable and Modular Design Benchmark.
papers.abstract: Progress in electronic design automation (EDA) has enabled us to manage the exponential growth of complexity in integrated circuits (ICs) allowed by Moore’s Law, and translate it into performance improvements. Furthermore, as Moore’s law slows down and with the collapse of Dennard scaling over the past decade, EDA tools become increasingly important in addressing inefficiencies in ICs. As new proposals and techniques are put forward to address the current and future issues of IC design, a concrete set of contemporary benchmarks needs to be used for their evaluation. Traditionally, EDA researchers have mainly relied on industry provided design benchmarks in evaluating the performance of their tools. However, due to their effort to maintain their competitive advantage, industry releases include older designs with limited information about the details of each design. This means that in multiple cases, new proposals are evaluated with significantly dated designs, often more than a decade old, especially in terms of scale. In this work, we describe OPDB: a scalable, modular, heterogeneous, and extensible design benchmark for the EDA community. OPDB leverages and extends the OpenPiton open-source, tile-based research infrastructure to create a surplus of design benchmarks that target different components. Due to the tiled nature of this architecture, OPDB benchmarks can be made arbitrarily large in order to evaluate the efficiency of EDA tools across different design scales and configurations. OPDB contains several accelerators enabling full SoC designs to be used as benchmarks for EDA tools.
papers.abstract_zh: 电子设计自动化 (EDA) 的进步使我们能够管理摩尔定律允许的集成电路 (IC) 复杂性的指数增长，并将其转化为性能改进。此外，随着过去十年摩尔定律的放缓以及登纳德缩放比例的崩溃，EDA 工具在解决 IC 效率低下问题方面变得越来越重要。随着新的提案和技术被提出来解决 IC 设计当前和未来的问题，需要使用一套具体的当代基准对其进行评估。传统上，EDA 研究人员主要依靠行业提供的设计基准来评估其工具的性能。然而，由于他们努力保持竞争优势，行业版本包括较旧的设计，有关每个设计细节的信息有限。这意味着在多种情况下，新的提案是用明显过时的设计来评估的，通常已经有十多年的历史了，特别是在规模方面。在这项工作中，我们描述了 OPDB：EDA 社区的可扩展、模块化、异构和可扩展的设计基准。 OPDB 利用并扩展了 OpenPiton 开源、基于图块的研究基础设施，以创建针对不同组件的大量设计基准。由于该架构的平铺性质，OPDB 基准可以任意大，以便评估不同设计规模和配置的 EDA 工具的效率。 OPDB 包含多个加速器，使完整的 SoC 设计能够用作 EDA 工具的基准。

papers.title: Optimal and Heuristic Approaches to Modulo Scheduling With Rational Initiation Intervals in Hardware Synthesis.
papers.abstract: A well-known approach for generating custom hardware with high throughput and low resource usage is modulo scheduling , in which the number of clock cycles between successive inputs [the initiation interval (II)] can be lower than the latency of the computation. The II is traditionally an integer , but in this article, we explore the benefits of allowing it to be a rational number. A rational II can be interpreted as the average number of clock cycles between successive inputs. Since the minimum rational II can be less than the minimum integer II, higher throughput is possible; moreover, allowing rational IIs gives more options in a design-space exploration. We formulate rational-II modulo scheduling as an integer linear programming (ILP) problem that is able to find latency-optimal schedules for a fixed rational II. We also propose two heuristic approaches that make rational-II scheduling more feasible: one based on identifying strongly connected components in the data-flow graph, and one based on iteratively relaxing the target II until a solution is found. We have applied our methods to a standard benchmark of hardware designs, and our results demonstrate an average speedup with respect to II of $1.24\times $ in 35% of the encountered scheduling problems compared to state-of-the-art formulations.
papers.abstract_zh: 生成具有高吞吐量和低资源使用率的定制硬件的一种众所周知的方法是模调度，其中连续输入之间的时钟周期数[启动间隔 (II)] 可以低于计算的延迟。 II 传统上是 整数 ，但在本文中，我们将探讨让它成为 有理数。有理 II 可以解释为连续输入之间的平均时钟周期数。由于最小有理数II可以小于最小整数II，因此更高的吞吐量是可能的；此外，允许有理 II 为设计空间探索提供了更多选择。我们将有理 II 模调度制定为整数线性规划 (ILP) 问题，能够为固定有理 II 找到延迟最优调度。我们还提出了两种启发式方法，使有理 II 调度更加可行：一种基于识别数据流图中的强连接组件，另一种基于迭代放松目标 II 直到找到解决方案。我们已将我们的方法应用于硬件设计的标准基准，我们的结果表明相对于 II 的平均加速 $1.24\times $与最先进的公式相比， 解决了 35% 遇到的调度问题。

papers.title: Optimizing Random Forest-Based Inference on RISC-V MCUs at the Extreme Edge.
papers.abstract: Random forests (RFs) use a collection of decision trees (DTs) to perform the classification or regression. RFs are adopted in a wide variety of machine learning (ML) applications, and they are finding increasing use also in scenarios at the extreme edge of the Internet of Things (TinyML) where memory constraints are particularly tight. This article addresses the optimization of the computational and storage costs for running DTs on the microcontroller units (MCUs) typically deployed in TinyML scenarios. We introduce three alternative DT kernels optimized for memory- and compute-limited MCUs, providing insight into the key memory-latency tradeoffs on an open-source RISC-V platform. We identify key bottlenecks and demonstrate that SW optimizations enable up to significant memory footprint and latency decrease. Experimental results show that the optimized kernels achieve up to 4.5 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\mu \text{s}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> latency, <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$4.8\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> speedup, and 45% storage reduction against the widely-adopted naive DT design. We carry out a detailed performance and energy cost analysis of various optimized DT variants: the best approach requires just 8 instructions and 0.155 pJ per decision.
papers.abstract_zh: 随机森林 (RF) 使用决策树 (DT) 集合来执行分类或回归。 RF 被广泛应用于各种机器学习 (ML) 应用中，而且它们在内存限制特别严格的物联网 (TinyML) 极端边缘的场景中也得到越来越多的使用。本文讨论了在 TinyML 场景中通常部署的微控制器单元 (MCU) 上运行 DT 的计算和存储成本的优化。我们引入了三种针对内存和计算有限的 MCU 进行优化的替代 DT 内核，从而深入了解开源 RISC-V 平台上的关键内存延迟权衡。我们确定了关键瓶颈，并证明软件优化可以显着减少内存占用并减少延迟。实验结果表明，优化后的内核可实现高达 4.5 的 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\mu \text{s}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 延迟，<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$4.8\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 与广泛采用的朴素 DT 设计相比，速度提升了 45%，存储空间减少了 45%。我们对各种优化的 DT 变体进行了详细的性能和能源成本分析：最佳方法只需 8 条指令和每个决策 0.155 pJ。

papers.title: PACA: A Pattern Pruning Algorithm and Channel-Fused High PE Utilization Accelerator for CNNs.
papers.abstract: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved significant advancements in various fields. However, the computation and storage overheads of CNNs are overwhelming for Internet-of-Things devices. Both network pruning algorithms and hardware accelerators have been introduced to empower CNN inference at the edge. Network pruning algorithms reduce the size and computational cost of CNNs by regularizing unimportant weights to zeros. However, existing works lack intrakernel structured types to tradeoff between sparsity and hardware efficiency, and the index storage for irregularly pruned networks is significant. Hardware accelerators leverage the sparsity of pruned CNNs to improve energy efficiency. However, their process element (PE) utilization rate is low because of uneven sparsity among input convolutional kernels. To overcome these problems, we propose PACA: a Pattern pruning Algorithm and Channel-fused high PE utilization Accelerator for CNNs. It includes three parts: a pattern pruning algorithm to explore the intrakernel sparsity type and reduce the index storage, a channel-fused hardware architecture to reduce the PEs’ idle rate and improve the performance, and a heuristic and taboo search-based smart fusion scheduler to analyze the idle PE problem and schedule the channel fusion in hardware. To demonstrate the effectiveness of PACA, we have implemented the software parts by Python and the hardware architecture by RTL codes. Experimental results on various datasets show that compared with an existing work, PACA can reduce the index storage overhead by <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.47\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.63\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> with 3.85–9.12 average patterns, and it can improve the hardware performance by <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.01\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.53\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> because of PEs’ idle rate reduction.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）在各个领域取得了显着的进步。然而，CNN 的计算和存储开销对于物联网设备来说是巨大的。网络剪枝算法和硬件加速器都已被引入，以增强 CNN 边缘推理能力。网络剪枝算法通过将不重要的权重正规化为零来减少 CNN 的大小和计算成本。然而，现有的工作缺乏内核结构类型来在稀疏性和硬件效率之间进行权衡，并且不规则修剪网络的索引存储非常重要。硬件加速器利用修剪后的 CNN 的稀疏性来提高能源效率。然而，由于输入卷积核之间的稀疏性不均匀，它们的过程元素（PE）利用率较低。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了 PACA：一种用于 CNN 的模式剪枝算法和通道融合高 PE 利用率加速器。它包括三个部分：模式剪枝算法，探索内核稀疏类型并减少索引存储；通道融合硬件架构，降低PE空闲率并提高性能；基于启发式和禁忌搜索的智能融合调度器，分析空闲PE问题并在硬件中调度通道融合。为了证明PACA的有效性，我们通过Python实现了软件部分，并通过RTL代码实现了硬件架构。在各种数据集上的实验结果表明，与现有工作相比，PACA可以减少索引存储开销 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.47\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.63\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 平均模式为 3.85–9.12，可以通过以下方式提高硬件性能： <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.01\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.53\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 因为 PE 闲置率降低。

papers.title: PACT: An Extensible Parallel Thermal Simulator for Emerging Integration and Cooling Technologies.
papers.abstract: Thermal analysis is an essential step that enables co-design of the computing system (i.e., integrated circuits and computer architectures) with the cooling system (e.g., heat sink). Existing thermal simulation tools are limited by several major challenges that prevent them from providing fast solutions to large problem sizes that are necessary to conduct standard-cell level thermal analysis or to evaluate new technologies or large chips. To overcome these challenges, we introduce a SPICE-based parallel compact thermal simulator (PACT) that achieves fast and accurate, standard cell to architecture-level, steady-state, and transient parallel thermal simulations. PACT utilizes the advantages of multicore processing (OpenMPI) and includes several solvers to speed up both steady-state and transient simulations. PACT can be easily extended to model a variety of emerging integration and cooling technologies by simply modifying the thermal netlist. In addition, PACT can also be used with popular architecture-level performance and power simulators. In comparison to a state-of-the-art finite-element method (FEM)-based simulator (COMSOL), PACT has a maximum error of 2.77% and 3.28% for steady-state and transient thermal simulations, respectively. Compared to a popular compact thermal simulator, HotSpot, PACT demonstrates a speedup of up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.83\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> and <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$186\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> for steady-state and transient simulations, respectively. We also show the applicability and extensibility of PACT through modeling emerging integration and cooling technologies, such as monolithic 3-D integrated circuits and liquid cooling via microchannels, and full-system simulation integration on a 2.5-D system with silicon-photonic network-on-chips (PNoCs).
papers.abstract_zh: 热分析是实现计算系统（即集成电路和计算机架构）与冷却系统（例如散热器）协同设计的重要步骤。现有的热仿真工具受到几个主要挑战的限制，无法为进行标准单元级热分析或评估新技术或大型芯片所需的大型问题提供快速解决方案。为了克服这些挑战，我们引入了基于 SPICE 的并行紧凑型热模拟器 (PACT)，它可以实现快速准确的标准单元到架构级、稳态和瞬态并行热模拟。 PACT 利用多核处理 (OpenMPI) 的优势，并包含多个求解器来加速稳态和瞬态仿真。只需修改热网表，即可轻松扩展 PACT，以对各种新兴集成和冷却技术进行建模。此外，PACT还可以与流行的架构级性能和功耗模拟器一起使用。与最先进的基于有限元法 (FEM) 的模拟器 (COMSOL) 相比，PACT 的稳态和瞬态热模拟的最大误差分别为 2.77% 和 3.28%。与流行的紧凑型热模拟器 HotSpot 相比，PACT 的加速速度高达 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.83\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 和<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$186\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 分别用于稳态和瞬态模拟。我们还通过对新兴集成和冷却技术进行建模来展示 PACT 的适用性和可扩展性，例如单片 3D 集成电路和通过微通道的液体冷却，以及使用硅光子片上网络 (PNoC) 的 2.5D 系统上的全系统仿真集成。

papers.title: PathDriver+: Enhanced Path-Driven Architecture Design for Flow-Based Microfluidic Biochips.
papers.abstract: Continuous-flow microfluidic biochips have attracted high research interest over the past years. Inside such a chip, fluid samples of milliliter volumes are eff

papers.title: PDF: Path-Oriented, Derivative-Free Approach for Safety Falsification of Nonlinear and Nondeterministic CPS.
papers.abstract: Cyber-physical systems (CPSs) integrate discrete computations with continuous physical processes and can be highly nonlinear and nondeterministic. Unlike the verification of CPS, which is difficult to handle, the falsification of CPS fulfills certain requirements from testing by seeking witness behavior of these systems and is easier to conduct. However, existing falsification techniques may fail to support the general complex CPS in practice because they usually focus on certain restricted classes of systems. In this article, we present a path-oriented, derivative-free approach to falsify safety properties in nonlinear and nondeterministic CPS. In our approach, we model the behavior of CPS by hybrid automata. Then, we enumerate candidate paths of hybrid automata (HA), transform the feasibility of candidate paths into optimization problems, and solve these optimization problems by our newly proposed classification model-based, derivative-free optimization algorithm. We also provide two novel pruning techniques to further improve the efficiency and efficacy of our approach: 1) a nested optimization structure with better model refinements for continuous search space pruning and 2) a hardly feasible path prefixes guided backtracking for discrete search space pruning. We implement our approach into a tool called PDF. Our experiments showed that PDF supported the safety falsification of CPS in all of our benchmarks, and it achieved success rates no lower than 95% in only seconds on 22/28 of the benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络物理系统 (CPS) 将离散计算与连续物理过程集成在一起，并且可以是高度非线性和不确定性的。与CPS的验证难以处理不同，CPS的证伪通过寻找这些系统的见证行为来满足测试的某些要求，并且更容易进行。然而，现有的伪造技术在实践中可能无法支持一般的复杂 CPS，因为它们通常专注于某些受限制的系统类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向路径、无导数的方法来伪造非线性和非确定性 CPS 中的安全属性。在我们的方法中，我们通过混合自动机对 CPS 的行为进行建模。然后，我们枚举混合自动机（HA）的候选路径，将候选路径的可行性转化为优化问题，并通过我们新提出的基于分类模型的无导数优化算法来解决这些优化问题。我们还提供了两种新颖的剪枝技术，以进一步提高我们方法的效率和功效：1）具有更好模型细化的嵌套优化结构，用于连续搜索空间剪枝；2）几乎不可行的路径前缀引导回溯，用于离散搜索空间剪枝。我们将我们的方法实施到一个名为 PDF 的工具中。我们的实验表明，PDF 在我们所有的基准测试中都支持 CPS 的安全伪造，并且在 22/28 的基准测试中仅几秒就达到了不低于 95% 的成功率。

papers.title: PervasiveFL: Pervasive Federated Learning for Heterogeneous IoT Systems.
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) has been recognized as a promising collaborative on-device machine learning method in the design of Internet of Things (IoT) systems. However, most existing FL methods fail to deal with IoT applications that contain a variety of IoT devices equipped with different types of neural network (NN) models. This is because traditional FL methods assume that local models on devices should have the same architecture as the global model on cloud. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework named PervasiveFL that enables efficient and effective FL among heterogeneous IoT devices. Without modifying original local models, PervasiveFL installs one lightweight NN model named modellet on each device. By using the deep mutual learning (DML) and our entropy-based decision gating (EDG) method, modellets and local models can selectively learn from each other through soft labels using locally captured data. Meanwhile, since modellets are of the same architecture, the learned knowledge by modellets can be shared among devices in a traditional FL manner. In this way, PervasiveFL can be pervasively applied to any heterogeneous IoT system. Comprehensive experimental results on four well-known datasets show that PervasiveFL can not only pervasively enable FL among heterogeneous devices within a large-scale IoT system, but also significantly enhance the inference accuracy of heterogeneous IoT devices with low communication overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 已被认为是物联网 (IoT) 系统设计中一种有前途的协作式设备上机器学习方法。然而，大多数现有的 FL 方法无法处理包含配备不同类型神经网络 (NN) 模型的各种物联网设备的物联网应用。这是因为传统的 FL 方法假设设备上的本地模型应与云上的全局模型具有相同的架构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 PervasiveFL 的新颖框架，它可以在异构物联网设备之间实现高效且有效的 FL。在不修改原始本地模型的情况下，PervasiveFL 在每台设备上安装一个名为 modellet 的轻量级神经网络模型。通过使用深度相互学习 (DML) 和我们基于熵的决策门控 (EDG) 方法，模型和本地模型可以使用本地捕获的数据通过软标签选择性地相互学习。同时，由于Modellet具有相同的架构，因此Modellet学习到的知识可以以传统的FL方式在设备之间共享。这样，PervasiveFL就可以普遍应用于任何异构物联网系统。在四个知名数据集上的综合实验结果表明，PervasiveFL不仅可以在大规模物联网系统内的异构设备之间普遍启用FL，而且还可以在低通信开销的情况下显着提高异构物联网设备的推理精度。

papers.title: Photonic Reconfigurable Accelerators for Efficient Inference of CNNs With Mixed-Sized Tensors.
papers.abstract: Photonic microring resonator (MRR)-based hardware accelerators have been shown to provide disruptive speedup and energy-efficiency improvements for processing deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, previous MRR-based CNN accelerators fail to provide efficient adaptability for CNNs with mixed-sized tensors. One example of such CNNs is depthwise separable CNNs. Performing inferences of CNNs with mixed-sized tensors on such inflexible accelerators often leads to low hardware utilization, which diminishes the achievable performance and energy efficiency from the accelerators. In this article, we present a novel way of introducing reconfigurability in the MRR-based CNN accelerators, to enable dynamic maximization of the size compatibility between the accelerator hardware components and the CNN tensors that are processed using the hardware components. We classify the state-of-the-art MRR-based CNN accelerators from prior works into two categories, based on the layout and relative placements of the utilized hardware components in the accelerators. We then use our method to introduce reconfigurability in accelerators from these two classes, to consequently improve their parallelism, the flexibility of efficiently mapping tensors of different sizes, speed, and overall energy efficiency. We evaluate our reconfigurable accelerators against three prior works for the area proportionate outlook (equal hardware area for all accelerators). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern CNNs indicates that our designed reconfigurable CNN accelerators provide improvements of up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.8\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> in frames-per-second (FPS) and up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.5\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> in FPS/W, compared to an MRR-based accelerator from prior work.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于光子微环谐振器 (MRR) 的硬件加速器已被证明可为深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的处理提供颠覆性的加速和能效改进。然而，之前基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器无法为具有混合大小张量的 CNN 提供高效的适应性。此类 CNN 的一个例子是深度可分离 CNN。在这种不灵活的加速器上使用混合大小的张量执行 CNN 推理通常会导致硬件利用率较低，从而降低了加速器可实现的性能和能源效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种在基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器中引入可重构性的新颖方法，以动态最大化加速器硬件组件和使用硬件组件处理的 CNN 张量之间的尺寸兼容性。我们根据加速器中所使用的硬件组件的布局和相对位置，将先前作品中最先进的基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器分为两类。然后，我们使用我们的方法在这两类加速器中引入可重构性，从而提高它们的并行性、有效映射不同大小、速度的张量的灵活性和整体能源效率。我们根据面积比例前景（所有加速器的硬件面积相同）对我们的可重构加速器与之前的三项工作进行了评估。我们对四个现代 CNN 推理的评估表明，我们设计的可重构 CNN 加速器可提供高达 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.8\times $ 的改进</tex-math></inline-formula> 以每秒帧数 (FPS) 为单位，最高 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.5\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula>与之前工作中基于 MRR 的加速器相比，以 FPS/W 计算。

papers.title: Preplacement Net Length and Timing Estimation by Customized Graph Neural Network.
papers.abstract: Net length is a key proxy metric for optimizing timing and power across various stages of a standard digital design flow. However, the bulk of net length information is not available until cell placement, and hence, it is a significant challenge to explicitly consider net length optimization in design stages prior to placement, such as logic synthesis. In addition, the absence of net length information makes accurate preplacement timing estimation extremely difficult. Poor predictability on the timing not only affects timing optimizations but also hampers the accurate evaluation of synthesis solutions. This work addresses these challenges by a preplacement prediction flow with estimators on both net length and timing. We propose a graph attention network (GAT) method with customization, called Net2, to estimate individual net length before cell placement. Its accuracy-oriented version Net2a achieves about 15% better accuracy than several previous works in identifying both long nets and long critical paths. Its fast version Net2f is more than <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1000\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> faster than placement while still outperforms previous works and other neural network techniques in terms of various accuracy metrics. Based on net size estimations, we propose the first machine learning-based preplacement timing estimator. Compared with the preplacement timing report from commercial tools, it improves the correlation coefficient in arc delays by 0.08, and reduces the mean absolute error in slack, worst negative slack, and total negative slack estimations by more than 50%.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络长度是优化标准数字设计流程各个阶段的时序和功耗的关键代理指标。然而，大部分网络长度信息直到单元布局才可用，因此，在布局之前的设计阶段（例如逻辑综合）明确考虑网络长度优化是一个重大挑战。此外，网络长度信息的缺乏使得准确的预置时序估计变得极其困难。时序的可预测性差不仅会影响时序优化，还会妨碍综合解决方案的准确评估。这项工作通过预置预测流程以及网络长度和时间估计器来解决这些挑战。我们提出了一种可定制的图注意网络（GAT）方法，称为 Net2，用于在单元放置之前估计单个网络长度。其面向准确性的版本 Net2a 在识别长网络和长关键路径方面比之前的几个作品提高了约 15% 的准确性。其快速版本 Net2f 比放置速度快于 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1000\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula>，同时仍然优于以前的作品和其他神经网络各种准确性指标方面的技术。基于净大小估计，我们提出了第一个基于机器学习的预置时序估计器。与商业工具的预置时序报告相比，它将电弧延迟的相关系数提高了0.08，并将松弛、最差负松弛和总负松弛估计的平均绝对误差降低了50%以上。

papers.title: Process-Resilient Fault-Tolerant Delay-Locked Loop Using TMR With Dynamic Timing Correction.
papers.abstract: A delay-locked loop (DLL) circuit is often useful for the clock synchronization in a chip incorporating multiple functional dies. In this work, we present a process-resilient fault-tolerant DLL design. We will first show that a naïve triple-module redundancy (TMR) technique cannot work well unless with a simple yet powerful static timing correction scheme to nullify the adversary effect caused by the voter circuit’s delay. Furthermore, we enhance it with a dynamic scheme so that the overall performance is immune to process variation. Through the proposed schemes, the maximum phase error over 1000 clock cycles between the DLL’s input and output clock signals after locking, which is often considered as the most important performance metric, can be reduced tremendously from 130 ps using only naïve TMR to 20 ps using static timing correction, and then further down to 11 ps using the dynamic timing correction.
papers.abstract_zh: 延迟锁定环 (DLL) 电路通常可用于集成多个功能芯片的芯片中的时钟同步。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种进程弹性的容错 DLL 设计。我们将首先证明，除非采用简单而强大的静态时序校正方案来消除投票器电路延迟造成的不利影响，否则简单的三模块冗余（TMR）技术无法很好地工作。此外，我们通过动态方案对其进行增强，以便整体性能不受过程变化的影响。通过所提出的方案，锁定后 DLL 输入和输出时钟信号之间超过 1000 个时钟周期的最大相位误差（通常被认为是最重要的性能指标）可以从仅使用朴素 TMR 的 130 ps 大幅降低到使用静态时序校正的 20 ps，然后使用动态时序校正进一步降低到 11 ps。

papers.title: PVSensing: A Process-Variation-Aware Space Allocation Strategy for 3D NAND Flash Memory.
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) flash memory is an emerging memory technology that enables a number of improvements to conventional planar NAND flash memory, including larger capacity, less program disturb, and lower access latency. Despite these advantages, 3D flash memory brings a number of new challenges. First, in 3D flash memory, NAND strings punch through multiple stacked layers to form the 3D infrastructure. Current etching process is unable to manufacture perfect channels with identical feature size. Second, with more stacked layers, the cell current in 3D flash memory is only 20% compared to planar flash memory, making it difficult to give a reliable sensing margin. These issues are affected by process variation, and they pose threats to the integrity of data stored in 3D flash memory. This article present PVSensing , a process-variation-aware space allocation strategy for open-channel SSD with 3D charge-trap flash memory. PVSensing is a novel hardware and file system interface that can transparently allocate physical space in the presence of process variation. PVSensing utilizes the rich functionalities provided by the system infrastructure of open-channel SSD to reduce the uncorrectable bit errors. Three reliability enhancement strategies (i.e., the adaptive creation of fault cubes, the physical block mining, and the live migration of write requests) are proposed. We demonstrate the viability of the proposed technique using a set of extensive experiments. Experimental results show that PVSensing can effectively reduce uncorrectable bit errors, and improve the reliability of critical data with negligible extra erase operations in comparison with representative schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 三维 (3D) 闪存是一种新兴的存储技术，它对传统平面 NAND 闪存进行了许多改进，包括更大的容量、更少的程序干扰和更低的访问延迟。尽管有这些优点，3D 闪存也带来了许多新的挑战。首先，在 3D 闪存中，NAND 串穿过多个堆叠层形成 3D 基础设施。目前的蚀刻工艺无法制造具有相同特征尺寸的完美通道。其次，由于堆叠层数较多，3D闪存的单元电流仅为平面闪存的20%，因此难以提供可靠的传感余量。这些问题受到工艺变化的影响，并对 3D 闪存中存储的数据的完整性构成威胁。本文介绍 PVSensing，这是一种用于具有 3D 电荷陷阱闪存的开放通道 SSD 的过程变化感知空间分配策略。 PVSensing 是一种新颖的硬件和文件系统接口，可以在存在过程变化的情况下透明地分配物理空间。 PVSensing利用开放通道SSD系统基础设施提供的丰富功能来减少不可纠正的比特错误。提出了三种可靠性增强策略（即故障立方体的自适应创建、物理块挖掘和写请求的实时迁移）。我们通过一系列广泛的实验证明了所提出技术的可行性。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，PVSensing可以有效减少不可纠正的位错误，并以可忽略的额外擦除操作提高关键数据的可靠性。

papers.title: Re-FeMAT: A Reconfigurable Multifunctional FeFET-Based Memory Architecture.
papers.abstract: Most of current processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures are application specific, that is, they can only accelerate particular functions, e.g., matrix-vector dot product for neural network acceleration. However, practical applications usually involve various functions. In order to accelerate different functions, various accelerators, and dedicated circuits have been proposed. In this work, by exploring the similarities among some commonly used dedicated circuits, we adopt ferroelectric field-effect transistors (FeFETs) to build a reconfigurable multifunctional memory architecture named Re-FeMAT. Re-FeMAT is composed of multiple processing elements (PEs). Each PE is not only a nonvolatile memory array, but also can perform logic operations (i.e., the PIM mode), convolutions (i.e., the binary convolutional neural network and the convolutional neural network (CNN) acceleration mode) and content search (i.e., the ternary content-addressable memory (TCAM) mode) without changing the circuit structure. Re-FeMAT can support applications that require multiple functions. As an example, by configuring different PEs to different working modes and using a simulated annealing algorithm or a tabu search algorithm to optimize the task-PE assignment, Re-FeMAT can completely accelerate few-shot learning applications. Our simulation results based on a calibrated FeFET model show that the proposed Re-FeMAT architecture achieves better performance and power efficiency than the previous FeMAT architecture. Compared with FeFET-based single-functional circuits, though the power dissipation of Re-FeMAT is higher in some modes, the power-delay product is still smaller. Compared with a state-of-the-art FeFET-based multifunctional accelerator named attention-in-memory, Re-FeMAT achieves lower power, latency, and energy when accelerating a complete few-shot learning task.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前大多数内存处理（PIM）架构都是特定于应用的，也就是说，它们只能加速特定的功能，例如用于神经网络加速的矩阵向量点积。然而，实际应用中通常会涉及到各种功能。为了加速不同的功能，已经提出了各种加速器和专用电路。在这项工作中，通过探索一些常用专用电路之间的相似性，我们采用铁电场效应晶体管（FeFET）构建了一种可重新配置的多功能存储器架构，名为Re-FeMAT。 Re-FeMAT 由多个处理元件 (PE) 组成。每个PE不仅是一个非易失性存储器阵列，而且可以在不改变电路结构的情况下执行逻辑运算（即PIM模式）、卷积（即二值卷积神经网络和卷积神经网络（CNN）加速模式）和内容搜索（即三态内容寻址存储器（TCAM）模式）。 Re-FeMAT 可以支持需要多种功能的应用。例如，通过将不同的PE配置为不同的工作模式，并使用模拟退火算法或禁忌搜索算法来优化任务-PE分配，Re-FeMAT可以完全加速few-shot学习应用。我们基于校准的 FeFET 模型的仿真结果表明，所提出的 Re-FeMAT 架构比之前的 FeMAT 架构实现了更好的性能和功效。与基于FeFET的单功能电路相比，尽管Re-FeMAT在某些模式下的功耗较高，但功率延迟积仍然较小。与最先进的基于 FeFET 的名为注意力记忆的多功能加速器相比，Re-FeMAT 在加速完整的几次学习任务时实现了更低的功耗、延迟和能量。

papers.title: Robust Processing-In-Memory With Multibit ReRAM Using Hessian-Driven Mixed-Precision Computation.
papers.abstract: This article presents an algorithmic approach to design reliable deep neural networks (DNNs) in the presence of stochastic variations in the network parameters induced by process variations in the bit cells in a processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture. We propose and derive a Hessian-based sensitivity metric that can be computed without computing or storing the full Hessian to identify and protect the “important” network parameters while allowing large variations in unprotected parameters. We also show that this metric can be used to aggressively quantize unprotected network parameters in the PIM for improved inference efficiency and compute density. Experiments on modern DNNs like ResNet, MobileNetv2, and DenseNet on CIFAR10 using measured RRAM device data shows the effectiveness of our approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种算法方法，用于在内存处理 (PIM) 架构中的位单元中的过程变化引起的网络参数随机变化的情况下设计可靠的深度神经网络 (DNN)。我们提出并推导了一种基于 Hessian 的灵敏度度量，无需计算或存储完整的 Hessian 即可计算，以识别和保护“重要”网络参数，同时允许未受保护的参数发生较大变化。我们还表明，该指标可用于积极量化 PIM 中未受保护的网络参数，以提高推理效率和计算密度。使用测量的 RRAM 设备数据对 CIFAR10 上的 ResNet、MobileNetv2 和 DenseNet 等现代 DNN 进行的实验表明了我们方法的有效性。

papers.title: Secured Data Transmission Over Insecure Networks-on-Chip by Modulating Inter-Packet Delays.
papers.abstract: As the network-on-chip (NoC) integrated into an SoC design can come from an untrusted third party, there is a growing risk that data integrity and security get compromised when supposedly sensitive data flows through such an untrusted NoC. We thus introduce a new method that can ensure secure and secret data transmission over such an untrusted NoC. Essentially, the proposed scheme relies on encoding binary data as delays between packets travelling across the source and destination pair. The maximum data transmission rate of this inter-packet-delay (IPD)-based communication channel can be determined from the analytical model developed in this article. To further improve the undetectability and robustness of the proposed data transmission scheme, a new block coding method and communication protocol are also proposed. Experimental results show that the proposed IPD-based method can achieve a packet error rate (PER) of as low as 0.3% and an effective throughput of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\boldsymbol {2.3\times 10^{5}}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> b/s, outperforming the methods of thermal covert channel, cache covert channel, and circuit-based encryption and, thus, is suitable for secure data transmission in unsecure systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于集成到 SoC 设计中的片上网络 (NoC) 可能来自不受信任的第三方，因此当所谓的敏感数据流经此类不受信任的 NoC 时，数据完整性和安全性受到损害的风险越来越大。因此，我们引入了一种新方法，可以确保在这种不可信的片上网络上进行安全且秘密的数据传输。本质上，所提出的方案依赖于将二进制数据编码为跨越源和目的地对的数据包之间的延迟。这种基于数据包间延迟 (IPD) 的通信通道的最大数据传输速率可以通过本文开发的分析模型来确定。为了进一步提高所提出的数据传输方案的不可检测性和鲁棒性，还提出了一种新的块编码方法和通信协议。实验结果表明，所提出的基于 IPD 的方法可以实现低至 0.3% 的包错误率 (PER) 和有效吞吐量 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\boldsymbol {2.3\times 10^{5}}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> b/s，优于热隐蔽通道、缓存隐蔽通道和基于电路的加密方法，因此适合不安全系统中的安全数据传输。

papers.title: SENTunnel: Fast Path for Sensor Data Access on Automotive Embedded Systems.
papers.abstract: Emerging autonomous vehicles equip multiple high-throughput sensors to enable automatic driving, such as multiline lidars and high-definition cameras. Existing automotive embedded systems usually employ software stacks to receive and preprocess high-throughput sensor data, which brings high latency and CPU consumption. Most research is devoted to accelerators for data processing but ignores the latency overhead caused by sensor data access. Therefore, this article proposes SENTunnel to build fast path from sensors to the corresponding processing units by offloading redundant software stacks into hardware. Specifically, SENTunnel builds fast path for sensor data access to processors/accelerators through two hardware modules. First, the unified access module is used to receive, parse, and transmit raw sensor data. Second, SENTunnel performs necessary preprocessing of different sensor data with the preprocessors module. Based on the design of SENTunnel, we implement a prototype for accessing the data of multiline lidars to the processor and a dedicated accelerator on FPGA. Experimental results indicate that SENTunnel reduces the latency by 55.5% for the data path to processors and reduces the CPU usage caused by the preprocessing driver by 45.9% on average. Compared to the original and partially offloaded data path to accelerators, SENTunnel reduces the latency by 93.8% and 93%, respectively, and eliminates the CPU costs.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的自动驾驶汽车配备了多个高通量传感器来实现自动驾驶，例如多线激光雷达和高清摄像头。现有的汽车嵌入式系统通常采用软件堆栈来接收和预处理高吞吐量的传感器数据，这会带来高延迟和CPU消耗。大多数研究都致力于数据处理加速器，但忽略了传感器数据访问引起的延迟开销。因此，本文提出SENTunnel，通过将冗余软件堆栈卸载到硬件中来构建从传感器到相应处理单元的快速路径。具体来说，SENTunnel 通过两个硬件模块构建传感器数据访问处理器/加速器的快速路径。首先，统一接入模块用于接收、解析和传输原始传感器数据。其次，SENTunnel 使用预处理器模块对不同传感器数据进行必要的预处理。基于SENTunnel的设计，我们实现了一个原型，用于将多线激光雷达的数据访问到处理器和FPGA上的专用加速器。实验结果表明，SENTunnel 使处理器数据路径的延迟减少了 55.5%，并且由预处理驱动程序引起的 CPU 使用率平均减少了 45.9%。与加速器的原始数据路径和部分卸载的数据路径相比，SENTunnel 分别将延迟减少了 93.8% 和 93%，并消除了 CPU 成本。

papers.title: SoFI: Security Property-Driven Vulnerability Assessments of ICs Against Fault-Injection Attacks.
papers.abstract: Fault-injection attacks have become a major concern for hardware designs, primarily due to their powerful capability in tampering with critical locations in a device to cause violation of its integrity, confidentiality, and availability. Researchers have proposed a number of physical and architectural countermeasures against fault-injection attacks; however, these techniques usually come with large overhead and design efforts making them difficult to use in practice. In addition, the current electronic design automation (EDA) tools are not fully equipped to support vulnerability assessment against fault-injection attacks at the design-time for secure hardware development. To perform a design-time (i.e., presilicon) evaluation of such attacks, a designer should be aware of various security vulnerabilities and must perform a tedious manual design review, which is time-consuming and hard to ensure effectiveness. Therefore, it is very important to develop an automatic assessment framework to identify the most security-critical locations in a design to fault-injection attacks and place emphasis on protecting those locations. In this article, we propose an automated framework for fault-injection vulnerability assessment of designs at gate-level, while considering the design-specific security properties (SPs) using novel models and metrics. The proposed framework identifies the faults that can violate the SPs of the design. As a result, applying local countermeasures will be more effective and the protection overhead will be reduced significantly. Our experimental results on the SP of AES, RSA, and SHA implementations show that the security threat from fault-injection attacks can be significantly mitigated by protecting the identified critical locations, which are less than 0.6% of the design.
papers.abstract_zh: 故障注入攻击已成为硬件设计的一个主要问题，主要是因为它们具有篡改设备中关键位置以导致其完整性、机密性和可用性遭到破坏的强大能力。研究人员提出了许多针对故障注入攻击的物理和架构对策；然而，这些技术通常需要大量的开销和设计工作，使得它们难以在实践中使用。此外，当前的电子设计自动化（EDA）工具还没有完全支持在安全硬件开发的设计时针对故障注入攻击的漏洞评估。为了对此类攻击进行设计时（即硅前）评估，设计人员应该了解各种安全漏洞，并且必须执行繁琐的手动设计审查，这既耗时又难以确保有效性。因此，开发一个自动评估框架来识别故障注入攻击设计中最安全关键的位置并重点保护这些位置非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于门级设计的故障注入漏洞评估的自动化框架，同时使用新颖的模型和指标考虑特定于设计的安全属性（SP）。所提出的框架可识别可能违反设计 SP 的故障。因此，应用本地对策将更加有效，并且保护开销将显着降低。我们对 AES、RSA 和 SHA 实现的 SP 的实验结果表明，通过保护已识别的关键位置（不到设计的 0.6%）可以显着减轻来自故障注入攻击的安全威胁。

papers.title: Space-Time-Efficient Modeling of Large-Scale 3-D Cross-Point Memory Arrays by Operation Adaption and Network Compaction.
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional (3-D) integrated cross-point memory arrays can be used to build high-density storage-class memory systems. However, the coupled network topology caused by sharing word lines or bit lines between adjacent memory layers significantly enlarges the memory space overhead and time cost of memory operation simulations on mega-scale 3-D cross-point memory arrays. We observe that different components of the 3-D cross-point array have different contribution significance to the key metrics of write or read operations, and the distribution patterns of principal components in the arrays are different for write and read operations. We propose an operation-adaptive array modeling framework that exploits the impact of the applied operation on the distribution of array principal components for 3-D cross-point memory arrays. Based on the modeling framework, we propose two array network compaction methods for efficient write and read operation simulations on 3-D cross-point arrays, respectively: 1) pruning zero-biased unselected cells and 2) group-merging neighboring half-selected cells with a specific granularity. Also, serially connected line segments are merged, and floating segments are deleted. Evaluations show that the proposed methods significantly reduce the memory space overhead and time cost of memory operation simulations for various layer sizes and different cell-level access parallelism in an array. Besides, the proposed methods can efficiently simulate memory operations on multilayered 3-D cross-point memory arrays with up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$4096\times 4096$ </tex-math></inline-formula> layer size under the 16-GB memory space constraint, achieving a 64-times improvement in layer size that can be simulated compared with the conventional complete 3-D cross-point array network model.
papers.abstract_zh: 三维（3-D）集成交叉点存储器阵列可用于构建高密度存储级存储器系统。然而，相邻存储层之间共享字线或位线所引起的耦合网络拓扑显着增大了大规模3D交叉点存储阵列上的存储操作模拟的存储空间开销和时间成本。我们观察到，3D交叉点数组的不同分量对写入或读取操作的关键指标具有不同的贡献意义，并且数组中主分量的分布模式对于写入和读取操作是不同的。我们提出了一种操作自适应阵列建模框架，该框架利用了所应用的操作对 3D 交叉点存储器阵列的阵列主成分分布的影响。基于建模框架，我们提出了两种阵列网络压缩方法，分别用于在 3D 交叉点阵列上进行高效的写入和读取操作模拟：1）修剪零偏未选择的单元和 2）以特定粒度对相邻的半选择单元进行分组合并。此外，串联连接的线段将被合并，浮动线段将被删除。评估表明，所提出的方法显着降低了阵列中不同层大小和不同单元级访问并行度的内存操作模拟的内存空间开销和时间成本。此外，所提出的方法可以有效地模拟多层3D交叉点存储器阵列上的存储器操作，最高可达 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$4096\times 4096$ </tex-math></inline-formula>在16GB内存空间约束下的层大小，与传统完整的3D交叉点阵列网络模型相比，可模拟层大小提高了64倍。

papers.title: SSSL: Secure Search Space Locking of Behavioral IPs.
papers.abstract: Raising the level of VLSI design abstraction from the Register Transfer Level (RTL) to the behavioral level has multiple advantages: (i) It reduces the turn-around-time, (ii) allows faster verification and (iii) extends the re-usability of the design as High-Level Synthesis (HLS) automatically re-optimizes the synthesized circuit when new process technologies are available by simply selecting a different technology library. Moreover, HLS makes extensive use of synthesis directives that control how to synthesize mainly loops (unroll or pipeline), arrays (register or RAM) and functions (inline or not). This further increases the re-usability of the behavioral code as it enables the generation of micro-architectures with different area vs. performance trade-offs. These advantages open the door to third party IP (3PIP) vendors providing Behavioral IPs (BIPs). Unfortunately, the market of third party BIPs is still very small and mostly limited to the HLS vendors themselves. Being so flexible is also their main weakness as it makes them only economically viable if the BIP provider can charge a large premium as it is highly unlikely that the BIP consumer will require their service again. Traditional IP vendors discriminate the price of the IP based on the amount of flexibility of the IP, e.g., RTL description vs. providing a synthesized gate netlist. We envision a similar price discrimination strategy for BIPs by limiting the re-usability of the BIP by partially encrypting the BIP source code. The main idea is to limit the search space, and hence, the re-usability of the BIP such that it only allows the BIP consumer to generate micro-architectures within a pre-defined search space range. This is accomplished by selectively fixing some of the synthesis directives in the form of pragmas at the source code while leaving others explorable. By encrypting the portion of the BIP that contains the fix pragmas we can guarantee that no designs outside of the pre-defined search space are generated. We believe that this work could serve as catalyst to grow the BIP market.
papers.abstract_zh: 将 VLSI 设计抽象级别从寄存器传输级别 (RTL) 提升到行为级别具有多种优势：(i) 缩短周转时间，(ii) 允许更快的验证，(iii) 扩展设计的可重用性，因为当新工艺技术可用时，只需选择不同的技术库，高级综合 (HLS) 就会自动重新优化综合电路。此外，HLS 广泛使用综合指令来控制如何综合主要循环（展开或管道）、数组（寄存器或 RAM）和函数（内联或非内联）。这进一步提高了行为代码的可重用性，因为它能够生成具有不同面积与性能权衡的微架构。这些优势为提供行为 IP (BIP) 的第三方 IP (3PIP) 供应商打开了大门。不幸的是，第三方 BIP 的市场仍然很小，并且大多仅限于 HLS 供应商本身。如此灵活也是他们的主要弱点，因为只有当 BIP 提供商可以收取高额费用时，他们才能在经济上可行，因为 BIP 消费者不太可能再次需要他们的服务。传统 IP 供应商根据 IP 的灵活性来区分 IP 的价格，例如 RTL 描述与提供综合门网表。我们设想对 BIP 采取类似的价格歧视策略，通过部分加密 BIP 源代码来限制 BIP 的可重用性。主要思想是限制搜索空间，从而限制 BIP 的可重用性，使其只允许 BIP 使用者在预定义的搜索空间范围内生成微架构。这是通过在源代码中以编译指示的形式有选择地修复一些综合指令，同时保留其他指令可探索来实现的。通过加密包含修复指令的 BIP 部分，我们可以保证不会生成预定义搜索空间之外的设计。我们相信这项工作可以成为 BIP 市场发展的催化剂。

papers.title: STPAcc: Structural TI-Based Pruning for Accelerating Distance-Related Algorithms on CPU-FPGA Platforms.
papers.abstract: As a promising solution to boost the performance of distance-related algorithms (e.g., $K$ -means and KNN), FPGA-based acceleration attracts lots of attention, but also comes with numerous challenges. In this work, we propose, STPAcc , an optimization framework based on structural triangle-inequality (TI)-based pruning (STP) for accelerating distance-related algorithms on CPU-FPGA platforms. STPAcc provides a domain-specific language to unify distance-related algorithms effectively, a structural TI-based pruning strategy to remove unnecessary distance computations, a coarse-grained workload partitioning and mapping strategy to fully exploit the potentials of the CPU-FPGA platform, and fine-grained hardware optimizations to further improve performance on the FPGA. Intensive experiments show that STPAcc designs achieve $31.42\times $ speedup and $99.63\times $ better energy efficiency on average over standard CPU-based implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为提高距离相关算法性能的有前途的解决方案（例如， $K$ -means 和 KNN），基于FPGA的加速引起了广泛关注，但也带来了众多挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 STPAcc ，这是一个基于结构三角不等式 (TI) 剪枝 (STP) 的优化框架，用于在 CPU-FPGA 平台上加速与距离相关的算法。 STPAcc 提供了一种有效统一距离相关算法的领域特定语言、一种基于 TI 的结构修剪策略来消除不必要的距离计算、一种粗粒度的工作负载划分和映射策略来充分利用 CPU-FPGA 平台的潜力，以及一种细粒度的硬件优化来进一步提高 FPGA 的性能。密集实验表明，STPAcc 设计实现了 $31.42\times $ 加速和 $99.63\times $ 与基于 CPU 的标准实现相比，平均能效更高。

papers.title: SWAP: A Server-Scale Communication-Aware Chiplet-Based Manycore PIM Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) is a promising technique to accelerate deep learning (DL) workloads. Emerging DL workloads (e.g., ResNet with 152 layers) consist of millions of parameters, which increase the area and fabrication cost of monolithic PIM accelerators. The fabrication cost challenge can be addressed by 2.5-D systems integrating multiple PIM chiplets connected through a network-on-package (NoP). However, server-scale scenarios simultaneously execute multiple compute-heavy DL workloads, leading to significant interchiplet data volume. State-of-the-art NoP architectures proposed in the literature do not consider the nature of DL workloads. In this article, we propose a novel server scale 2.5-D manycore architecture called SWAP that accounts for the traffic characteristics of DL applications. Comprehensive experimental evaluations with different system sizes as well as diverse emerging DL workloads demonstrate that SWAP achieves significant performance and energy consumption improvements with much lower fabrication cost than state-of-the-art NoP topologies.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 是一种很有前途的加速深度学习 (DL) 工作负载的技术。新兴的深度学习工作负载（例如，具有 152 层的 ResNet）由数百万个参数组成，这增加了单片 PIM 加速器的面积和制造成本。制造成本挑战可以通过集成多个通过封装网络 (NoP) 连接的 PIM 小芯片的 2.5 维系统来解决。然而，服务器规模的场景同时执行多个计算量大的深度学习工作负载，导致芯片间数据量巨大。文献中提出的最先进的 NoP 架构没有考虑深度学习工作负载的性质。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 SWAP 的新型服务器规模 2.5 维众核架构，它考虑了 DL 应用程序的流量特征。对不同系统规模以及各种新兴深度学习工作负载的综合实验评估表明，SWAP 实现了显着的性能和能耗改进，且制造成本比最先进的 NoP 拓扑低得多。

papers.title: Tardis: Coverage-Guided Embedded Operating System Fuzzing.
papers.abstract: Embedded operating systems (Embedded OSs) are extensively deployed in many mission-critical industrial scenarios. Any defects within these systems may result in unacceptable losses. Therefore, it is imperative to develop tools to detect bugs within Embedded OSs, thus minimizing potential impacts on industrial infrastructures. Coverage-guided fuzzing is a vulnerability detection technique that has found numerous real-world vulnerabilities within both application programs as well as kernels. However, state-of-the-art kernel fuzzers, e.g., Syzkaller, mainly target general purpose-operating systems, such as Linux, macOS, and Windows, whereas Embedded OSs support is mostly lacking. In this article, we propose Tardis, the first Embedded OSs fuzzer capable of testing a wide selection of Embedded OSs while leveraging coverage feedback. Tardis conducts OS-agnostic code coverage collection and analysis, allowing developers and testers to test a wide range of Embedded OSs without significant manual efforts. We implemented and evaluated Tardis on several well-known Embedded OSs, such as UC/OS and FreeRTOS. Tardis can successfully perform fuzz testing on these kernels without significant manual effort for adaptation. By leveraging coverage feedback, Tardis can cover 51.32% more branches than black-box fuzzing on average on the respective Embedded OSs over 24 h. Tardis also found 17 previously unknown bugs among the target Embedded OSs.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入式操作系统（Embedded OS）广泛部署在许多关键任务工业场景中。这些系统内的任何缺陷都可能导致不可接受的损失。因此，必须开发工具来检测嵌入式操作系统中的错误，从而最大限度地减少对工业基础设施的潜在影响。覆盖范围引导的模糊测试是一种漏洞检测技术，已在应用程序和内核中发现了许多现实世界中的漏洞。然而，最先进的内核模糊器（例如 Syzkaller）主要针对通用操作系统，例如 Linux、macOS 和 Windows，而大多缺乏对嵌入式操作系统的支持。在本文中，我们提出了 Tardis，这是第一个嵌入式操作系统模糊器，能够在利用覆盖率反馈的同时测试多种嵌入式操作系统。 Tardis 进行与操作系统无关的代码覆盖率收集和分析，允许开发人员和测试人员测试各种嵌入式操作系统，而无需大量手动操作。我们在几个著名的嵌入式操作系统（例如 UC/OS 和 FreeRTOS）上实现并评估了 Tardis。 Tardis 可以成功地对这些内核执行模糊测试，而无需大量的手动调整工作。通过利用覆盖率反馈，Tardis 在 24 小时内在各个嵌入式操作系统上平均可以比黑盒模糊测试多覆盖 51.32% 的分支。 Tardis 还在目标嵌入式操作系统中发现了 17 个以前未知的错误。

papers.title: TCSE: A Target Cell States Elimination Coding Strategy for Highly Reliable Data Storage Based on 3-D nand Flash Memory.
papers.abstract: With the wide application of NAND flash storage systems in read-intensive memory, the corresponding reliability enhancement strategies for mitigating read disturb become the focus of investigations in recent years. The prior investigations have reported the strategies based on data modulation and verified their effectiveness in mitigating retention loss. The most significant advantage of these strategies is that they can often achieve significant reliability enhancement effect with great read performance, since they are usually based on asymmetric coding. This feature means that they have the potential to be ideal reliability enhancement strategies for read-intensive memory applications. To propose a universal and highly reliable data storage strategy, this article first observes the error modes at the cell-state level under the reliability stresses of retention loss and read disturb with floating-gate (FG) 3-D triple-level (TLC) NAND flash, and then proposes a target cell states elimination (TCSE) coding strategy for further restraining bit errors. In addition, this article for the first time reports the extra bit errors generated in the decoding process of the storage strategies based on data modulation, and defines the concept of transfer factor (TF) for evaluation. By using the proposed TCSE, the experimental results show that the overall bit error rate (BER) can be reduced by 80%–90% on average, compared with the raw random data pattern.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着NAND闪存存储系统在读密集型存储器中的广泛应用，相应的减轻读干扰的可靠性增强策略成为近年来研究的热点。先前的研究报告了基于数据调制的策略，并验证了它们在减轻保留损失方面的有效性。这些策略最显着的优点是它们通常可以实现显着的可靠性增强效果和良好的读取性能，因为它们通常基于非对称编码。这一特性意味着它们有可能成为读取密集型内存应用的理想可靠性增强策略。为了提出一种通用且高可靠的数据存储策略，本文首先观察浮栅（FG）3D三级（TLC）NAND闪存在保留丢失和读取干扰的可靠性压力下单元状态级别的错误模式，然后提出一种目标单元状态消除（TCSE）编码策略以进一步抑制位错误。此外，本文首次报道了基于数据调制的存储策略在解码过程中产生的额外比特错误，并定义了传输因子（TF）的概念进行评估。通过使用所提出的 TCSE，实验结果表明，与原始随机数据模式相比，总体误码率 (BER) 平均可降低 80%–90%。

papers.title: The Detection of Open and Leakage Faults for Prebond TSV Test Based on Weak Current Source.
papers.abstract: During the manufacturing process of three-dimensional integrated circuits (3-D ICs), many defects may occur in through-silicon vias (TSVs). These defects affect the integrity of the signal passing through TSVs, therefore detecting these defects in the early production stage is crucial. This article proposed a built-in-self-test (BIST) method with a simple test structure and easily implemented fault detection process. Due to the fact that the defects in TSVs influence the charge/discharge speed of TSVs’ equivalent capacitance, a weak current source is designed as the central part of the proposed test structure, which can measure the TSVs’ charge/discharge speed and quantify it using digital values. The effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method is validated by HSPICE simulation. The minimum measurable fault, test time, and test circuit area are also assessed in this article. The simulation results show that the method this article proposed can detect weaker faults, compared with the traditional test methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 在三维集成电路（3-D IC）的制造过程中，硅通孔（TSV）中可能会出现许多缺陷。这些缺陷会影响通过 TSV 的信号的完整性，因此在早期生产阶段检测这些缺陷至关重要。本文提出了一种测试结构简单、故障检测过程易于实现的内置自测试（BIST）方法。由于 TSV 的缺陷影响 TSV 等效电容的充电/放电速度，因此设计了一个弱电流源作为所提出的测试结构的中心部分，它可以测量 TSV 的充电/放电速度并使用数字值对其进行量化。通过HSPICE仿真验证了该方法的有效性和鲁棒性。本文还评估了最小可测量故障、测试时间和测试电路面积。仿真结果表明，与传统的测试方法相比，本文提出的方法能够检测出较弱的故障。

papers.title: Tinkertoy: Build Your Own Operating Systems for IoT Devices.
papers.abstract: The Internet of Things (IoT) makes it possible for tiny devices with sensing and communication capabilities to be interconnected and interact with the cyber–physical world. However, these tiny devices have limited computing power and memory, so they often cannot run commodity operating systems, such as Windows and Linux. IoT devices are deployed everywhere, from smart home appliances to self-driving vehicles, and their applications impose ever-increasing and more heterogeneous demands on software architecture. There are many special-purpose and embedded operating systems built to satisfy these wildly different requirements, from early sensor network operating systems, such as TinyOS and Contiki, to more modern robot and real-time control systems, such as FreeRTOS and Zephyr. However, the rapid evolution and heterogeneity of IoT applications calls for a different solution. Specifically, this work introduces Tinkertoy, a collection of standard operating system modules from which developers can easily assemble customized operating systems. A customized operating system provides precisely the functionality needed by an application and consumes up to four times less memory than other IoT operating systems without sacrificing performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 使具有传感和通信功能的微型设备能够与网络物理世界互连并交互。然而，这些微型设备的计算能力和内存有限，因此它们通常无法运行 Windows 和 Linux 等商用操作系统。从智能家电到自动驾驶汽车，物联网设备无处不在，其应用对软件架构提出了不断增长且更加异构的要求。有许多专用和嵌入式操作系统是为了满足这些截然不同的要求而构建的，从早期的传感器网络操作系统（如 TinyOS 和 Contiki）到更现代的机器人和实时控制系统（如 FreeRTOS 和 Zephyr）。然而，物联网应用的快速发展和异构性需要不同的解决方案。具体来说，这项工作介绍了 Tinkertoy，这是一组标准操作系统模块，开发人员可以从中轻松组装定制操作系统。定制的操作系统可精确提供应用程序所需的功能，并且在不牺牲性能的情况下消耗的内存比其他物联网操作系统少四倍。

papers.title: Understanding and Exploiting the Full Potential of SSD Address Remapping.
papers.abstract: Duplicate writes are prevalent in storage systems, originating from data duplication, journaling, and data relocations, etc. As flash-based solid state drives (SSDs) have been widely deployed, duplicate writes can significantly degrade their performance and lifetime. Prior studies have proposed innovative approaches that exploit the address remapping utility inside an SSD to eliminate duplicate writes. However, remap operations modify the logical-to-physical (L2P) address mapping table while the physical-to-logical (P2L) mappings persisted on flash memory remain unchanged. Such inconsistency between L2P and P2L mappings may cause data corruption and has long been a major obstacle to utilize SSD address remapping. In this article, we propose a novel SSD design, called Remap-SSD-LH, that realizes the full potential of SSD address remapping. It provides a remap primitive, which allows the host software and SSD firmware to perform logical writes of duplicate data at almost zero cost. To ensure mapping consistency as well as fast mapping lookups, Remap-SSD-LH employs a local log scheme based on hybrid storage. A local log is maintained for each flash garbage collection unit to record relevant P2L mapping changes induced by remap operations. The logs are stored in small nonvolatile RAM (NVRAM), e.g., capacitor-protected DRAM, and can be destaged to flash memory if NVRAM is full. We verify Remap-SSD-LH on a software SSD emulator with three case studies: 1) intra-SSD deduplication; 2) SQLite journaling; and 3) F2FS cleaning. The experimental results show that Remap-SSD-LH can maximally and efficiently exploit address remapping to improve SSD performance and lifetime.
papers.abstract_zh: 重复写入在存储系统中普遍存在，其根源在于数据重复、日志记录和数据重定位等。随着基于闪存的固态硬盘 (SSD) 的广泛部署，重复写入会显着降低其性能和使用寿命。先前的研究提出了利用 SSD 内的地址重新映射实用程序来消除重复写入的创新方法。但是，重映射操作会修改逻辑到物理 (L2P) 地址映射表，而闪存上保留的物理到逻辑 (P2L) 映射保持不变。 L2P 和 P2L 映射之间的这种不一致可能会导致数据损坏，并且长期以来一直是使用 SSD 地址重新映射的主要障碍。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 SSD 设计，称为 Remap-SSD-LH，它实现了 SSD 地址重新映射的全部潜力。它提供了一个重映射原语，允许主机软件和SSD固件以几乎零成本执行重复数据的逻辑写入。为了确保映射一致性以及快速映射查找，Remap-SSD-LH采用了基于混合存储的本地日志方案。为每个闪存垃圾收集单元维护本地日志，以记录由重映射操作引起的相关P2L映射变化。日志存储在小型非易失性 RAM (NVRAM) 中，例如电容器保护的 DRAM，并且如果 NVRAM 已满，则可以将其降级到闪存。我们通过三个案例研究在软件 SSD 模拟器上验证 Remap-SSD-LH：1）SSD 内重复数据删除； 2）SQLite日志； 3) F2FS 清理。实验结果表明，Remap-SSD-LH可以最大限度地、有效地利用地址重映射来提高SSD的性能和寿命。

papers.title: VECBEE: A Versatile Efficiency-Accuracy Configurable Batch Error Estimation Method for Greedy Approximate Logic Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Approximate computing is an emerging strategy to improve the energy efficiency of many error-tolerant applications. To design an approximate circuit automatically, many approximate logic synthesis (ALS) methods have been proposed, among which many are greedy. To improve the synthesis quality of these greedy methods, one key is to calculate the errors of all candidate approximate transformations accurately. However, the traditional simulation-based method is time consuming. Instead, many existing methods just perform quick but inaccurate error estimation. In this work, to improve both the accuracy and runtime of error estimation, we propose VECBEE, a versatile efficiency–accuracy configurable batch error estimation method for greedy ALS. It is based on Monte Carlo simulation and an efficient technique to capture whether a signal change due to an introduced approximation will be propagated to each primary output. VECBEE is generally applicable to any statistical error measurement, such as error rate and average error magnitude, and any graph-based circuit representation. It allows a flexible tradeoff between the error estimation accuracy and the runtime, while even the fully accurate version is much faster than the traditional simulation-based method. We apply VECBEE to two representative greedy ALS methods and demonstrate its effectiveness in generating better approximate circuits. The code of VECBEE is made open source.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似计算是一种新兴策略，旨在提高许多容错应用程序的能源效率。为了自动设计近似电路，已经提出了许多近似逻辑综合（ALS）方法，其中许多是贪婪的。为了提高这些贪心方法的综合质量，关键是准确计算所有候选近似变换的误差。然而，传统的基于模拟的方法非常耗时。相反，许多现有方法只是执行快速但不准确的误差估计。在这项工作中，为了提高误差估计的准确性和运行时间，我们提出了 VECBEE，一种用于贪婪 ALS 的多功能效率-精度可配置批量误差估计方法。它基于蒙特卡罗模拟和一种有效的技术，用于捕获由于引入的近似而导致的信号变化是否会传播到每个主输出。 VECBEE 通常适用于任何统计误差测量，例如误差率和平均误差幅度，以及任何基于图形的电路表示。它允许在误差估计精度和运行时间之间进行灵活的权衡，而即使是完全准确的版本也比传统的基于仿真的方法快得多。我们将 VECBEE 应用于两种代表性的贪婪 ALS 方法，并证明其在生成更好的近似电路方面的有效性。 VECBEE的代码是开源的。

papers.title: Via-Based Redistribution Layer Routing for InFO Packages With Irregular Pad Structures.
papers.abstract: The integrated fan-out (InFO) wafer-level chip-scale package (WLCSP) is introduced for modern system-in-package designs with larger I/O counts, higher interconnection density, and small form factors. A redistribution layer (RDL) in an InFO package is an extra metal layer for interchip connections, and RDL routing is crucial for achieving desired interchip connections. In a high-density InFO package, multiple RDLs with flexible vias are often adopted. To integrate chips of different technology nodes into one package, irregular pad structures need to be considered; however, no published RDL routing work considers flexible vias or irregular pad structures. This article formulates a new RDL routing problem with unified-assigned pad pairs on a via-based multilayer multichip InFO package with irregular pad structures and presents the first algorithm for this problem. The algorithm consists of a preprocessing stage, three routing stages, and a layout optimization stage. The preprocessing stage analyzes routing resources and potential routing congestion. The first routing stage performs layer assignment based on a weighted maximum planar subset of chords algorithm to route interchip nets concurrently. The second routing stage constructs a 3-D routing graph based on partitioned octagonal tiles to handle the irregular layout structure and applies A*-search to route remaining interchip nets. The third routing stage transforms a routing graph into a network-flow model to perform concurrent routing for chip-to-board nets by applying the minimum-cost maximum-flow algorithm. Finally, we develop an efficient linear-programming-based layout optimization algorithm to find desired solutions. Experimental results show that our router can achieve 100% routablility for all benchmarks under limited RDLs, while the previous state-of-the-art work cannot.
papers.abstract_zh: 集成扇出 (InFO) 晶圆级芯片级封装 (WLCSP) 专为具有更大 I/O 数量、更高互连密度和小外形尺寸的现代系统级封装设计而推出。 InFO 封装中的再分布层 (RDL) 是用于芯片间连接的额外金属层，RDL 布线对于实现所需的芯片间连接至关重要。在高密度InFO封装中，通常采用具有柔性通孔的多个RDL。为了将不同技术节点的芯片集成到一个封装中，需要考虑不规则的焊盘结构；然而，没有已发表的 RDL 布线工作考虑灵活的过孔或不规则的焊盘结构。本文提出了一个新的 RDL 布线问题，该问题在具有不规则焊盘结构的基于通孔的多层多芯片 InFO 封装上具有统一分配的焊盘对，并提出了该问题的第一个算法。该算法由一个预处理阶段、三个布线阶段和一个布局优化阶段组成。预处理阶段分析路由资源和潜在的路由拥塞。第一布线阶段基于弦算法的加权最大平面子集执行层分配，以同时布线芯片间网络。第二个布线阶段基于分区的八角形图块构建 3D 布线图来处理不规则的布局结构，并应用 A* 搜索来布线剩余的芯片间网络。第三路由阶段将路由图转换为网络流模型，通过应用最小成本最大流算法来执行芯片到板网络的并发路由。最后，我们开发了一种高效的基于线性规划的布局优化算法来找到所需的解决方案。实验结果表明，我们的路由器可以在有限的 RDL 下实现所有基准测试的 100% 可路由性，而之前最先进的工作则不能。

papers.title: ViA: A Novel Vision-Transformer Accelerator Based on FPGA.
papers.abstract: Since Google proposed Transformer in 2017, it has made significant natural language processing (NLP) development. However, the increasing cost is a large amount of calculation and parameters. Previous researchers designed and proposed some accelerator structures for transformer models in field-programmable gate array (FPGA) to deal with NLP tasks efficiently. Now, the development of Transformer has also affected computer vision (CV) and has rapidly surpassed convolution neural networks (CNNs) in various image tasks. And there are apparent differences between the image data used in CV and the sequence data in NLP. The details in the models contained with transformer units in these two fields are also different. The difference in terms of data brings about the problem of the locality. The difference in the model structure brings about the problem of path dependence, which is not noticed in the existing related accelerator design. Therefore, in this work, we propose the ViA, a novel vision transformer (ViT) accelerator architecture based on FPGA, to execute the transformer application efficiently and avoid the cost of these challenges. By analyzing the data structure in the ViT, we design an appropriate partition strategy to reduce the impact of data locality in the image and improve the efficiency of computation and memory access. Meanwhile, by observing the computing flow of the ViT, we use the half-layer mapping and throughput analysis to reduce the impact of path dependence caused by the shortcut mechanism and fully utilize hardware resources to execute the Transformer efficiently. Based on optimization strategies, we design two reuse processing engines with the internal stream, different from the previous overlap or stream design patterns. In the stage of the experiment, we implement the ViA architecture in Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA and finally achieved ~5.2 times improvement of energy efficiency compared with NVIDIA Tesla V100, and 4–10 times improvement of performance compared with related accelerators based on FPGA, that obtained nearly 309.6 GOP/s computing performance in the peek.
papers.abstract_zh: 自谷歌于2017年提出Transformer以来，它在自然语言处理（NLP）方面取得了重大进展。然而，增加的成本是大量的计算和参数。先前的研究人员设计并提出了一些用于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）中的变压器模型的加速器结构，以有效地处理NLP任务。现在，Transformer 的发展也影响了计算机视觉（CV），并在各种图像任务中迅速超越了卷积神经网络（CNN）。并且CV中使用的图像数据和NLP中的序列数据存在明显的差异。这两个领域的变压器单元所包含的模型的细节也不同。数据的差异带来了局部性的问题。模型结构的差异带来了路径依赖的问题，而这一问题在现有的相关加速器设计中并未被注意到。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了 ViA，一种基于 FPGA 的新型视觉变压器 (ViT) 加速器架构，以高效执行变压器应用程序并避免这些挑战的成本。通过分析ViT中的数据结构，我们设计了合适的分区策略，以减少图像中数据局部性的影响，提高计算和内存访问的效率。同时，通过观察ViT的计算流程，我们利用半层映射和吞吐量分析来减少捷径机制带来的路径依赖的影响，充分利用硬件资源高效地执行Transformer。基于优化策略，我们设计了两个具有内部流的复用处理引擎，不同于以往的重叠或流设计模式。在实验阶段，我们在Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA上实现了ViA架构，最终实现了与NVIDIA Tesla V100相比能效提升约5.2倍，与基于FPGA的相关加速器相比性能提升了4-10倍，峰值时获得了近309.6 GOP/s的计算性能。

papers.title: WA-OPShare: Workload-Adaptive Over-Provisioning Space Allocation for Multi-Tenant SSDs.
papers.abstract: Sharing a flash-based solid-state drive (SSD) among multiple tenants has become a common practice to improve storage utilization and cost efficiency. Meanwhile, how to allocate limited storage resources, especially the over-provisioning space (OPS) resources, among competitive tenants has emerged as a critical problem. The OPS refers to additional user-invisible storage space, whose size influences garbage collection (GC) efficiency. Due to unawareness of workload characteristics of different tenants, prior studies on multitenant OPS allocation lead to suboptimal SSD performance. In this article, we propose a novel workload-adaptive OPS allocation scheme for multitenant SSDs, called WA-OPShare. It targets an OPS sharing scheme that dynamically allocates the OPS among tenants to improve overall SSD performance. Two models are developed to identify underutilized storage space and predict the OPS-induced performance benefit of each tenant, respectively. Guided by the models, WA-OPShare regularly releases the underutilized storage space and then reallocates it to the tenant who can benefit the most. Experimental results show that compared to the traditional Partition and Sharing schemes, WA-OPShare improves the performance by up to 40.3% and 31.2%, and reduces the write amplification by up to 37.0% and 17.5%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 在多个租户之间共享基于闪存的固态硬盘 (SSD) 已成为提高存储利用率和成本效率的常见做法。同时，如何在竞争激烈的租户之间分配有限的存储资源，特别是超额配置空间（OPS）资源也成为一个关键问题。 OPS是指额外的用户不可见的存储空间，其大小影响垃圾收集（GC）效率。由于不了解不同租户的工作负载特征，先前对多租户 OPS 分配的研究导致 SSD 性能不理想。在本文中，我们提出了一种适用于多租户 SSD 的新型工作负载自适应 OPS 分配方案，称为 WA-OPShare。它的目标是 OPS 共享方案，在租户之间动态分配 OPS，以提高 SSD 的整体性能。我们开发了两个模型来分别识别未充分利用的存储空间并预测每个租户由 OPS 带来的性能优势。在模型的指导下，WA-OPShare定期释放未充分利用的存储空间，然后将其重新分配给最能受益的租户。实验结果表明，与传统的分区和共享方案相比，WA-OPShare的性能提升分别高达40.3%和31.2%，并分别降低了37.0%和17.5%的写放大。

papers.title: XMAP: Programming Memristor Crossbars for Analog Matrix-Vector Multiplication: Toward High Precision Using Representable Matrices.
papers.abstract: Linear transformations are the dominating computation within many important applications. The natural multiply-and-accumulate feature of memristor crossbar arrays promise unprecedented processing capabilities to resistive dot-product engines (DPEs), which can accelerate approximate matrix–vector multiplication (MVM). Unfortunately, the precision of the analog computation may be degraded by parasitics, nonlinear device characteristics, and variations. In this article, we propose a framework, called XMAP, for mapping an arbitrary matrix into appropriate memristor conductance values (or state variables for nonlinear devices). The specified conductance values are next programmed to the memristor hardware using accurate closed-loop tuning. XMAP is based on formulating the mapping problem as a mathematical optimization problem, which can be elegantly minimized using the concept of representable matrices, i.e., the matrices that can be represented on a crossbar. Compared to the state-of-the-art conversion algorithm, the computational accuracy is improved with up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.29 \times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> at the expense of overhead in runtime. The precision improvements translate into noteworthy application-level benefits within signal compression and neural network inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 线性变换是许多重要应用中的主导计算。忆阻器交叉阵列的自然乘法和累加功能为电阻点积引擎（DPE）提供了前所未有的处理能力，可以加速近似矩阵向量乘法（MVM）。不幸的是，模拟计算的精度可能会因寄生效应、非线性器件特性和变化而降低。在本文中，我们提出了一个称为 XMAP 的框架，用于将任意矩阵映射到适当的忆阻器电导值（或非线性器件的状态变量）。接下来使用精确的闭环调谐将指定的电导值编程到忆阻器硬件。 XMAP 基于将映射问题表述为数学优化问题，可以使用可表示矩阵（即可以在交叉开关上表示的矩阵）的概念来优雅地最小化该问题。与最先进的转换算法相比，计算精度提高了高达 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.29 \times $ </tex-math></inline-formula>运行时的开销。精度的提高转化为信号压缩和神经网络推理中值得注意的应用级优势。
